programme.title: Con El Corazón En La Mano
programme.desc: Una mujer que busca mejorar su posición social no puede encontrar la felicidad. Ella vive atrapada en un falso mundo de lujo, pero pronto conocerá a un hombre que le cambiará su vida por completo.

programme.title: La Rebelión De Los Adolescentes
programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario regresa a casa después de la muerte de su padre, luego descubre que su papá fue asesinado por miembros de un sindicato del crimen.

programme.title: A la Orilla de un Palmar
programme.desc: La Fierecilla Domada de Shakespeare es la base argumental de esta película. La acción y los personajes se transladan a un pequeño pueblo rural de la costa mexicana y la acción se adereza con números musicales basados en el folklore local.

programme.title: La Bienamada
programme.desc: Antonio está próximo a casarse con su novia Nieves. Durante un chequeo médico, necesario antes de casarse, los médicos descubren una condición que llevará los sentimientos al extremo.

programme.title: Peligros de Juventud
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes enfrenta un enredo amoroso. Uno de ellos, un joven limpiabotas, está perdidamente enamorado de una chica, pero ella ama a otro, quien, a su vez, está interesado en alguien más.

programme.title: Con El Corazón En La Mano

programme.title: Cárcel de Mujeres
programme.desc: Evangelina asesina a su amante Alberto. En prisión ella conoce a Dora, la novia de Alberto, quien fue privada de su libertad por los negocios ilícitos de él. Una interesante historia esta a punto de tejerse.

programme.title: El Águila Real
programme.desc: Un cargamento de cocaína pura será la maldición y perdición de un hombre tranquilo.

programme.title: El Pecado de Ser Pobre
programme.desc: Un ex presidiario ayuda a la joven que ama pues ella tiene que trabajar en un cabaret para mantener a su padre borracho.

programme.title: El Misterio del Carro Express
programme.desc: El detective de la policía y su valiente prometida, una reportera, persiguen a la banda que atracó un tren.

programme.title: La Banda de la Sotana Negra
programme.desc: Ha ocurrido un terrible asesinato perpetrado por la banda del Fantasma Negro, todo hace suponer que se quieren quedar con la hacienda del difunto, porque se rumora que allí hay un tesoro escondido.

programme.title: Cárcel de Mujeres
programme.desc: Evangelina asesina a su amante Alberto. En prisión ella conoce a Dora, la novia de Alberto, quien fue privada de su libertad por los negocios ilícitos de él. Una interesante historia esta a punto de tejerse.

programme.title: El Águila Real
programme.desc: Un cargamento de cocaína pura será la maldición y perdición de un hombre tranquilo.

programme.title: El Pecado de Ser Pobre
programme.desc: Un ex presidiario ayuda a la joven que ama pues ella tiene que trabajar en un cabaret para mantener a su padre borracho.

programme.title: El Misterio del Carro Express
programme.desc: El detective de la policía y su valiente prometida, una reportera, persiguen a la banda que atracó un tren.

programme.title: Mi alma gemela
programme.desc: ¿Cuál es la mejor opción? ¿Un refugio familiar tranquilo o un romance apasionado? ¿Una esposa, con la que ha vivido durante décadas, o una joven amante? Después de pensarlo mucho, el protagonista de la película, Alexei, de 40 años, opta por rehacer su vida...

programme.title: Mi alma gemela
programme.desc: Alexei confiesa su infidelidad y deja a Vera. Se casa con Marina, pero pronto conoce a otra mujer, Varvara, con quien siente una conexión profunda.

programme.title: Mi alma gemela
programme.desc: Alexei busca a Varvara y se enamora de ella. Marina descubre su romance y le envía fotos comprometedoras, desatando una crisis.

programme.title: Mi alma gemela
programme.desc: Marina exige el divorcio. Alexei encuentra en casa de Varvara objetos de su antiguo hogar con Vera y descubre una impactante verdad.

programme.title: Mi alma gemela
programme.desc: ¿Cuál es la mejor opción? ¿Un refugio familiar tranquilo o un romance apasionado? ¿Una esposa, con la que ha vivido durante décadas, o una joven amante? Después de pensarlo mucho, el protagonista de la película, Alexei, de 40 años, opta por rehacer su vida...

programme.title: Mi alma gemela
programme.desc: Alexei confiesa su infidelidad y deja a Vera. Se casa con Marina, pero pronto conoce a otra mujer, Varvara, con quien siente una conexión profunda.

programme.title: Mi alma gemela
programme.desc: Alexei busca a Varvara y se enamora de ella. Marina descubre su romance y le envía fotos comprometedoras, desatando una crisis.

programme.title: Mi alma gemela
programme.desc: Marina exige el divorcio. Alexei encuentra en casa de Varvara objetos de su antiguo hogar con Vera y descubre una impactante verdad.

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Anna Koroleva es la primera belleza de la ciudad. Hace tiempo que se ha acostumbrado a la idea de que todo el mundo se interesa sólo por su aspecto. Está rodeada de flores y admiradores, muchos pretendientes. El bandido local Zhukov tampoco pudo resistirse a ella, pero Anna se mantiene inaccesible: no le gusta Zhukov. Contrata a unos matones para que den una lección de venganza a la terca belleza. Un transeúnte, Andrei Savin, es testigo del ataque y defiende a la chica. Inesperadamente, Anna se enamora de Andrei. Al enterarse de la aventura de Anna, Zhukov se enfurece. Al descubrir que su antigua amante está embarazada, le dice a Andrei que el bebé es supuestamente suyo, de Zhukov. Andrei intenta averiguar la verdad, pero Anna, ofendida por su desconfianza, declara que efectivamente está embarazada del bandido. Andrei la deja, Anna aborta. Si hubiera podido adivinar a dónde la llevaría su orgullo...

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Zhukov le dice a Andrei que el hijo de Anna es suyo. Andrei cree el rumor, lo que provoca que Anna termine la relación y aborte. Udalov asesina a Gushin, pero antes de morir, este logra decirle a Andrei el nombre de su asesino. Anna, al ver a Andrei consolando a Natasha, la hija de Gushin, piensa que él ya no la ama y, en un acto de desesperación, intenta suicidarse. Su mejor amiga, Masha, la lleva al hospital. En venganza contra Andrei, Anna acepta casarse con Maks, el médico que le salvó la vida. Mientras tanto, Udalov establece en Rusia un negocio de adopciones ilegales de niños extranjeros, con la ayuda de la directora del hospital materno-infantil, María Serguéievna.

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Andrei se casa con Natasha, quien está feliz, ya que siempre ha estado enamorada de él. Mientras tanto, el negocio de Maks enfrenta problemas, pues un poderoso mafioso llamado *El Amo* le exige pagar sus deudas. Para salvar el negocio de su esposo, Anna se convierte en amante de *El Amo*. Andrei recibe la visita de su amigo Vadim, quien está en Moscú investigando a Udalov por tráfico de niños. Juntos, deciden atraparlo. Anna y Andrei se reencuentran y sus sentimientos renacen, pero Natasha queda embarazada y Andrei no se atreve a abandonarla. Después de discutir con Andrei, Anna toma un taxi, pero los pasajeros, unos adolescentes drogadictos, intentan abusar de ella. En la lucha, uno de ellos muere.

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Maks se divorcia de Anna y, aprovechando su detención, la deja sin nada. Andrei intercede ante un alto funcionario (el padre del joven fallecido) para evitar que el caso de Anna avance, ya que ella es inocente. Anna es liberada. Vadim invita a Andrei a Moscú, donde abren una agencia de detectives. Natasha apoya la decisión de su esposo y lo acompaña, pero su matrimonio se deteriora, ya que Andrei no puede olvidar a Anna. En la estación de tren, Anna salva a un hombre de un intento de asesinato: es Udalov. *El Amo* había enviado a un sicario para matarlo por no compartir sus ganancias en el tráfico de niños.

programme.desc: Andrei se casa con Natasha, quien está feliz, ya que siempre ha estado enamorada de él. Mientras tanto, el negocio de Maks enfrenta problemas, pues un poderoso mafioso llamado *El Amo* le exige pagar sus deudas. Para salvar el negocio de su esposo, Anna se convierte en amante de *El Amo*. Andrei recibe la visita de su amigo Vadim, quien está en Moscú investigando a Udalov por tráfico de niños. Juntos, deciden atraparlo. Anna y Andrei se reencuentran y sus sentimientos renacen, pero Natasha queda embarazada y Andrei no se atreve a abandonarla. Después de discutir con Andrei, Anna toma un taxi, pero los pasajeros, unos adolescentes drogadictos, intentan abusar de ella. En la lucha, uno de ellos muere.

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Maks se divorcia de Anna y, aprovechando su detención, la deja sin nada. Andrei intercede ante un alto funcionario (el padre del joven fallecido) para evitar que el caso de Anna avance, ya que ella es inocente. Anna es liberada. Vadim invita a Andrei a Moscú, donde abren una agencia de detectives. Natasha apoya la decisión de su esposo y lo acompaña, pero su matrimonio se deteriora, ya que Andrei no puede olvidar a Anna. En la estación de tren, Anna salva a un hombre de un intento de asesinato: es Udalov. *El Amo* había enviado a un sicario para matarlo por no compartir sus ganancias en el tráfico de niños.

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Anna Koroleva es la primera belleza de la ciudad. Hace tiempo que se ha acostumbrado a la idea de que todo el mundo se interesa sólo por su aspecto. Está rodeada de flores y admiradores, muchos pretendientes. El bandido local Zhukov tampoco pudo resistirse a ella, pero Anna se mantiene inaccesible: no le gusta Zhukov. Contrata a unos matones para que den una lección de venganza a la terca belleza. Un transeúnte, Andrei Savin, es testigo del ataque y defiende a la chica. Inesperadamente, Anna se enamora de Andrei. Al enterarse de la aventura de Anna, Zhukov se enfurece. Al descubrir que su antigua amante está embarazada, le dice a Andrei que el bebé es supuestamente suyo, de Zhukov. Andrei intenta averiguar la verdad, pero Anna, ofendida por su desconfianza, declara que efectivamente está embarazada del bandido. Andrei la deja, Anna aborta. Si hubiera podido adivinar a dónde la llevaría su orgullo...

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Zhukov le dice a Andrei que el hijo de Anna es suyo. Andrei cree el rumor, lo que provoca que Anna termine la relación y aborte. Udalov asesina a Gushin, pero antes de morir, este logra decirle a Andrei el nombre de su asesino. Anna, al ver a Andrei consolando a Natasha, la hija de Gushin, piensa que él ya no la ama y, en un acto de desesperación, intenta suicidarse. Su mejor amiga, Masha, la lleva al hospital. En venganza contra Andrei, Anna acepta casarse con Maks, el médico que le salvó la vida. Mientras tanto, Udalov establece en Rusia un negocio de adopciones ilegales de niños extranjeros, con la ayuda de la directora del hospital materno-infantil, María Serguéievna.

programme.title: Belleza

Vadim invita a Andrei a Moscú, donde abren una agencia de detectives. Natasha apoya la decisión de su esposo y lo acompaña, pero su matrimonio se deteriora, ya que Andrei no puede olvidar a Anna. En la estación de tren, Anna salva a un hombre de un intento de asesinato: es Udalov. *El Amo* había enviado a un sicario para matarlo por no compartir sus ganancias en el tráfico de niños.

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Agradecido por haberle salvado la vida, Udalov lleva a Anna a Europa, donde ella comienza a ayudarlo en su negocio, sin saber que las adopciones son ilegales. Mientras tanto, en Moscú, la periodista Aline le muestra a Vadim y Andrei un video de su programa de televisión, donde una mujer llamada Olga revela que Udalov la mantuvo prisionera cuando intentó retractarse de entregar a su bebé en adopción. Udalov envía a Anna a Moscú por otro niño, pero esta vez el bebé está destinado a tráfico de órganos. En Moscú, El Amo secuestra a Anna para obligarla a revelar el paradero de Udalov.

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Anna logra escapar. Udalov, al enterarse de que Anna no recogió al niño del orfanato, viaja apresuradamente a Moscú. Temiendo por su seguridad, decide quedarse en la ciudad y le compra a Anna una clínica de cirugía plástica. Anna se sumerge en su trabajo y es feliz. Mientras tanto, la policía se acerca cada vez más a Udalov. Anna le confiesa su amor por Andrei y le pide que lo localice. Sin querer perder a su "Galatea", Udalov le miente a Anna, diciéndole que Andrei ha muerto.

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: El amor entre Anna y Andrei renace y pasan la noche juntos. Sin embargo, Vadim llama desesperado a Andrei para informarle que su hijo, Pavlik, está gravemente enfermo. Anna también va al hospital a verlo, pero Andrei, molesto, le exige que se vaya. Anna se siente herida. Aline le revela a Anna que Udalov es un criminal, pero ella se niega a creerlo, ya que le ha dado una nueva vida y educación. Mientras tanto, Udalov intenta asesinar a El Amo. Anna le cuenta a Udalov que Andrei tiene un video con el testimonio de Alexandra, una mujer que trabajó para Udalov en Europa y sabe demasiado sobre sus negocios ilegales. Udalov entra en pánico y empieza a borrar cualquier evidencia en su contra. Vadim llama a Andrei con una noticia terrible: ha ocurrido una tragedia en la agencia de detectives…

programme.title: Belleza
programme.desc: Una explosión destruye la agencia y todos sus documentos. Anna empieza a darse cuenta de quién es realmente Udalov. Este, viendo que la situación se vuelve insostenible, decide huir a Europa. Le propone un trato a Anna: ella le hace una cirugía para cambiar su identidad, y a cambio, él ordenará la muerte de Natasha, la esposa de Andrei. Anna acepta. La operación es un éxito. Más tarde, Udalov llama a Anna y le dice que Natasha morirá en una hora. En ese momento, Anna se da cuenta del terrible error que ha cometido e intenta advertir a Andrei, pero llega tarde: el sicario mata a Natasha y también a Andrei, quien intentaba protegerla. Destrozada, Anna entrega a Udalov a la policía, ya que es la única que sabe cómo luce ahora. Regresa a su ciudad natal y decide comenzar una nueva vida. Con el corazón roto, pero con un propósito, adopta a Pavlik, el hijo de Andrei, para criarlo como suyo.

Este, viendo que la situación se vuelve insostenible, decide huir a Europa. Le propone un trato a Anna: ella le hace una cirugía para cambiar su identidad, y a cambio, él ordenará la muerte de Natasha, la esposa de Andrei. Anna acepta. La operación es un éxito. Más tarde, Udalov llama a Anna y le dice que Natasha morirá en una hora. En ese momento, Anna se da cuenta del terrible error que ha cometido e intenta advertir a Andrei, pero llega tarde: el sicario mata a Natasha y también a Andrei, quien intentaba protegerla. Destrozada, Anna entrega a Udalov a la policía, ya que es la única que sabe cómo luce ahora. Regresa a su ciudad natal y decide comenzar una nueva vida. Con el corazón roto, pero con un propósito, adopta a Pavlik, el hijo de Andrei, para criarlo como suyo.

programme.title: Ángel
programme.desc: Pyotr y Ksenia terminan sus estudios y tienen una vida adulta e independiente por delante. Los jóvenes se aman desde hace tiempo y con devoción y ya piensan en formar una familia. Un día, el padre de Ksenia, que trabaja como jefe de una empresa de construcción, se mete en problemas. Es sospechoso de blanqueo de dinero a gran escala y en un futuro próximo no sólo se arriesga a perder todo su patrimonio, sino también a ir a la cárcel durante mucho tiempo. De repente, un viejo conocido de la madre de Ksenia, Grigory Dmitrievich, que ocupa un alto cargo en la administración local de la ciudad, se ofrece a resolver los problemas de su padre. Sin embargo, pone una única condición a cambio: Ksenia debe casarse con su hijo Dima, un futuro pintor que estudia pintura en un colegio.

programme.title: Ángel
programme.desc: Han pasado veinte años. Una familia de un renombrado artista llega a la ciudad costera para pasar el verano. Se trata de Dmitri, Ksenia y su hija Rita. Pronto, Ksenia recibe una invitación para una reunión de excompañeros de escuela y decide asistir. En el fondo, no puede negar su deseo de volver a ver a Piotr. Mientras tanto, su hija Rita, de 19 años, se ve envuelta en una situación peligrosa, de la que es rescatada por Piotr. Ahora él es un hombre respetado en la ciudad: periodista, empresario y editor de un importante periódico local. En sus manos tiene una historia explosiva sobre corrupción con antiguas casas de campo estatales del partido, propiedades de gran valor. Entre Rita y Piotr comienza a surgir una atracción.

programme.title: Ángel
programme.desc: Ksenia le exige a Piotr que se aleje de su hija, pero él se mantiene firme: una vez dejó ir a su gran amor y no piensa cometer el mismo error de nuevo. Está decidido a luchar por Rita. Ksenia escucha lo mismo de su hija: ella no piensa renunciar a Piotr por la opinión de sus padres. Mientras tanto, el escándalo de las casas estatales sigue creciendo. Un colega de Piotr, Edik, descubre que su teléfono está siendo intervenido. La persona detrás de esto pertenece a la élite política. Pronto, dos desconocidos irrumpen en la oficina del periódico exigiendo que entreguen el expediente comprometedor, o la familia de Piotr estará en peligro.

programme.title: Ángel
programme.desc: Piotr decide que Rita debe quedarse con sus padres por seguridad. Ksenia acepta una tregua temporal con él. Piotr entrega su artículo para la próxima edición del periódico, pero por órdenes "desde arriba", toda la tirada es retirada bajo la acusación de difamación. Mientras tanto, Dmitri no renuncia a su plan de separar a Piotr y Rita. Se reúne con el exnovio de su hija, Aleksandr, instructor del centro náutico, y le da su visto bueno para retomar la relación con Rita… siempre y cuando logre deshacerse de Piotr.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max está demasiado dolido y no cree ya en ese amor, advirtiéndole que a partir de ahora se dedicará a odiarla, a olvidarla y que será ella la victima de su propia decisión. Ciego de ira y de dolor, grita a los presentes que se retiren pues no habrá boda.

programme.title: Espacio Para Mejorar
programme.desc: Glenn Keating y Gustav van der Westhuizen viven en Grace Park, Drumcondra, con su hijo Noah, de 5 años, y sus dos perros Weimaraner. Viven en una casa adosada de tres pisos de la época eduardiana. Esta terraza fue construida originalmente para oficiales del ejército británico entre 1897 y 1902. Glenn es trabajador juvenil para jóvenes LGBTI+ en el centro de la ciudad, y Gustav es banquero.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: The intensity reaches a fever pitch at the Save Mart Center as Fresno hosts Round 10 of the Arena Championship Series West. Experience a masterclass in technical driving as the 2025 Arena Racer of the Year, Blake Granger, attempts a historic sweep of the night's competitions. From the high-speed precision of JCB Racing to the gravity-defying stunts of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, every driver—including fan favorites like Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Armando Castro in El Toro Loco—pushes their 12,000-pound machine to the limit. Witness heart-stopping "nose wheelies," backflips, and "moonwalks" in an action-packed event that culminates in an electric Freestyle finale.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: Juan se ofrece voluntario para ser cobaya de unos laboratorios y prueba una píldora para el crecimiento del cabello.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: Lucía y Belén consiguen trabajo de cajeras en un supermercado. Se enteran de que el premio de una marca de aceitunas está en una de las mil latas que el supermercado va a recibir.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: Aprovechando una ola de robos por la zona, Juan y Andrés fingen un robo en casa de Nieves para convencer a los vecinos de que pongan puertas blindadas en sus casas.

programme.title: Bandolera
programme.desc: Amor, aventura, comedia y drama. 'Bandolera' posee los elementos propios del relato de época y de las historias de amor imposibles y apasionadas. La escritora Sara Reeves hace justicia en Arazana.

programme.title: Bandolera

programme.title: Alli Abajo
programme.desc: Don Benjumea reaparece en Sevilla tras su accidente y Maritxu está feliz, pero pronto el extraño comportamiento de su marido le hará sospechar que algo terrible ha ocurrido en la selva...

programme.title: Alli Abajo
programme.desc: Carmen descubre que está embarazada y decide contárselo a Iñaki en una cena especial, pero pierde el test de embarazo. La cuadrilla lo encuentra y comienzan las especulaciones sobre quién es su dueña.

programme.title: Alli Abajo
programme.desc: La cuadrilla está feliz con la noticia del embarazo de Carmen, pero hay un problema. En el sur, Maritxu y don Benjumea están preocupados por la relación de Cristóbal con Trini.

programme.title: Alli Abajo
programme.desc: Carmen se ha ido a Sevilla para pensar en sus problemas con Iñaki. Cuando regresa a Donosti dispuesta a arreglar las cosas, se encuentra a Iñaki en casa, pero no está solo.

programme.title: Saras y Kumud
programme.desc: Vidyachatur informa a Guniyal de los rumores de que Pramad es alcohólico. Sunny le explica a Kusum que Saraswatichandra no lastimó a Kumud intencionalmente. Mientras tanto, Saras ve a Pramad bebiendo y decide no irse.

programme.title: Saras y Kumud
programme.desc: Naveenchandra y Alak discuten sobre el presupuesto para la ayuda contra las inundaciones. Naveenchandra menciona la herida de Kumud frente a Saubhagyadevi, quien luego le informa a Buddhidhan al respecto.

programme.title: Saras y Kumud
programme.desc: La policía le dice a Sunny que están cerrando el caso de Saraswatichandra. Kumud le dice a Naveenchandra que salga de la casa lo antes posible. Pero Naveenchandra dice que no se irá hasta que esté seguro de que Kumud está a salvo.

programme.title: Saras y Kumud
programme.desc: Pramad amenaza con lastimar a Kumud a menos que ella le dé el dinero. Naveenchandra interfiere, pero Pramad toma el dinero y amenaza a Kumud nuevamente. Mientras tanto, Kusum llama a Kumud a su teléfono fijo.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: A raíz de un conato de incendio por una colilla, prohíben fumar en el edificio. Los no fumadores son en su mayoría no propietarios, como Belén y Emilio, que intentan desengancharse juntos

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: Los vecinos deciden contratar a un administrador. La primera medida que acuerdan es prescindir del portero y encargarse ellos mismos, por turnos, de las tareas de limpieza y recogida de basura.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: A Emilio le cumple el plazo para abandonar la portería y decide declararle la guerra a la comunidad. Acampa delante de la portería y, aconsejado por Carmen, demanda a la comunidad

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: El administrador se hace eco de las peticiones de los vecinos y destituyen a Juan de presidente. Ante la ausencia de candidatos, se hace el pertinente sorteo y sale Mauri.

programme.title: Bandolera
programme.desc: Amor, aventura, comedia y drama. 'Bandolera' posee los elementos propios del relato de época y de las historias de amor imposibles y apasionadas. La escritora Sara Reeves hace justicia en Arazana.

programme.title: Bandolera
programme.desc: Amor, aventura, comedia y drama. 'Bandolera' posee los elementos propios del relato de época y de las historias de amor imposibles y apasionadas. La escritora Sara Reeves hace justicia en Arazana.

programme.title: Alli Abajo
programme.desc: Don Benjumea descubre que Jozé sigue siendo pobre y le confiesa que le dejó las tierras porque en ellas hay un tesoro que escondió su tatarabuela. Junto con Rosamari, irán a buscar el tesoro.

programme.title: Saras y Kumud
programme.desc: Saras intenta poner celosa a Kumud haciéndose amigo de una chica llamada Radha. Dugba recibe un mensaje y encierra a Kumari en una habitación.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: Emilio y Juan descubren una rata y deciden cazarla sin decir nada para que no cunda el pánico. Se quedan dormidos y cuando Juan llega a casa por la mañana, Paloma sospecha que tiene una aventura.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: Roberto vuelve a casa para intentar reconciliarse con Lucía pero se encuentra allí a Carlos, el ex novio de la chica. Discute con su ex novia y decide mudarse definitivamente.

programme.title: Bandolera

programme.title: Alli Abajo
programme.desc: Iñaki y Carmen siguen sin hablarse tras el desliz de Iñaki con Gotzone. Mientras, en el sur, la próxima boda de Trini y Cristóbal es todo un acontecimiento en la clínica.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: Roberto vuelve a casa para intentar reconciliarse con Lucía pero se encuentra allí a Carlos, el ex novio de la chica. Discute con su ex novia y decide mudarse definitivamente.

programme.title: Aqui No Hay Quien Viva
programme.desc: Marisa y Vicenta le cuentan a Paco, Emilio y José Miguel que hace muchos años el portero de la finca se volvió loco y prendió fuego a la casa, por lo que murió una familia que vivía en el ático.

programme.title: Saras y Kumud
programme.desc: Kumud no reacciona a los celos y dice que no hay lugar para los celos en el amor. Saras se enoja pero luego terminan teniendo un romance. Dugba lamenta haber regañado a Kumari.

programme.title: Que Vida Mas Triste

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What’s a woman to do when her spouse is constantly standing over her shoulder and nitpicking everything she does? Michelle says her husband, Jim, has controlled her for the 15 years that they’ve been together, and she’s fed up with his faultfinding. She says he tells her what to wear, how much she should eat, and even uses a GPS to track her whereabouts! Jim admits that his behavior is out of control and fears that he could be pushing his wife out the door. Why is he so critical of Michelle, and can Dr. Phil get the judgmental hubby to change his ways? Then, Sally says her husband, John, is so controlling that she spends most of her days picking up dust bunnies from the floor and only speaking when he allows her to. John says cleanliness is next to godliness and believes control is a matter of perception. See what causes him to go toe to toe with Dr. Phil! Will the couple get the help they’re seeking? It’s an explosive Dr. Phil you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sisters Rylie, 23, and Lenae, 26, claim their father, Leonard, was extremely physically and verbally abusive during their childhood and that they lived in constant fear of him — allegations he absolutely denies. They also claim their mother, Susan, did not protect them from him. Rylie claims the alleged abuse was so damaging that she believes it’s the cause of her diagnosis of Borderline Personality Disorder. Lenae says the many years of alleged verbal abuse have led to self-loathing and even an eating disorder. Leonard admits to having a tough disciplinary style, but refutes his daughters accusations — even saying they’ve blown everything out of proportion.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lauren says she resents her parents, Laura and John, claiming that as a teen, Laura stole her identity and racked up $50,000 in debt – a claim Laura denies – and that John had affairs on her mom and drank alcohol and used drugs with her and her teenage friends. John admits he was the “party dad,” but claims he was just trying to bond with Lauren. But is this just the tip of the iceberg? Dr. Phil drops the bombshell that John spent nearly two years behind bars and was dubbed the “Breast Pump Bandit” by his city’s local news. It’s a Dr. Phil episode you cannot miss!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In part one, amid claims of drinking and doing drugs with teenagers and extramarital affairs, Dr. Phil revealed that Lauren’s father, John, had been dubbed the “Breast Pump Bandit” by his city’s local news, for stealing thousands of dollars’ worth of breast pumps and selling them online --and admitted to taking Lauren on some of his shoplifting heists. Today, John admits that he’s addicted to Xanax and crack cocaine, and to stealing from Lauren’s mother to support his habit. Lauren says she wants her mom to kick him out of their lives once and for all. How does Laura respond? It’s a shocking conclusion you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Frankie and his former wife, Karen Leanne Dees, made headlines and were the subject of a Lifetime movie called Baby Brokers. The couple was accused of scamming would-be parents out of thousands of dollars by promising them one of their unborn babies in exchange for financial support. Frankie says he and Karen had 10 children, and he claims eight of those children were placed for adoption without his knowledge. His daughters Sandy and Ava claim their biological father not only knew about the adoption scam, but they say they believe he was the mastermind behind it. What was Frankie’s involvement? Sandy claims her biological parents “sold her like a piece of furniture for $5,000.” Find out what happens when Sandy meets her biological father for the first time.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Sandy and Ava, who confronted their biological father, Frankie, about his alleged involvement in an adoption scam. Sandy and Ava claim Frankie and his former wife, Karen Leanne Dees, “sold” their children in an adoption scam, where they promised prospective parents they could adopt one of their unborn babies in exchange for financial support. Their brother, Dalton, says he was Frankie and Karen’s ninth child who was adopted. He claims his biological parents put a $3,000 price tag on his head and that he was the last child “sold” before his mother was arrested. Plus, meet one of the prospective parents who adopted one of Karen’s children. Find out why she says Frankie belongs behind bars. And, Frankie’s youngest child, Ava, says she was raised by her father after her mother was arrested by the FBI -- but she says she did not have a better life than her siblings. Find out a dark secret Ava reveals about her father, and why she wants him to take a polygraph test. What happens when Dr. Phil offers Frankie the opportunity to take a polygraph test?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: How has the role of the man evolved in the modern family? One woman claims her husband provides her with everything—except love and affection. He says he only knows how to provide financially. Can Dr. Phil help them find a balance and save their marriage of 17 years? Then, one guest entered into a new relationship after leaving his wife and kids. Now, his guilt is causing him to lie, manipulate and become physically abusive. Find out what Dr. Phil has to say to these men about the true measure of a man’s success in a relationship!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Millions were inspired by the first “Role of the Man” show. Now, Dr. Phil is making it an ongoing series and checking in with past guests. Remember the husband who provided everything for his wife…except intimacy? He’s back! Are they now sleeping in the same bed? Then, you’ll hear from the man who wanted his wife to have sex with him on demand. Did he change his selfish ways or is he still in the doghouse? Plus, what’s a mama’s boy to do when his wife insists he cut the umbilical cord once and for all?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Attention men: If you have a child on the way, or dream of being a father some day, you don’t want to miss this show! A little-known law could keep you from having any rights to your child. Bryce and Esther dated for one month before Esther became pregnant. Bryce says he wanted to marry Esther and raise their child together, but Esther says she wasn’t ready to be a mother. When they broke up, Esther decided to place the baby for adoption without informing Bryce. When Bryce finally learned his daughter was born, she was already seven days old and placed with another family. Now Bryce is fighting to get his child back, but because of an obscure law in some states, he has lost his rights as a father. What law did Bryce fail to comply with that even the lawyers in this case weren’t previously aware of? Is he unfit as a father, or is this law unconstitutional? Bryce and Esther’s lawyers give their opinion. Plus, the grandparents at odds over Esther’s decision face off. Don’t miss this heated discussion and learn more about the Putative Fathers Registry!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Christina, 21, and her younger sister, Carlie, 13, say they had a close relationship with their father, Michael, until two years ago when he decided to transition to a female. Michael was a police officer, soldier and loving parent who lived his life as a male for 40 years. Now, he wants his daughters to call him Mom, because he says Dad is gone, but they refuse. Michael, who prefers to be called Kayla, says she wants to explain to her daughters why she's living as a woman, but they've never given her the chance. The last time Christina saw her father was two years ago when he showed up at her work in lace and blue jeans to break the news that he's transgendered. When she sees Kayla onstage, does she greet her with open arms? Next, Carlie joins her sister and father. She says she wants her old dad back, but will she feel the same after seeing Kayla? Can the father-daughter bond be turned into a mother-daughter one? Be prepared for an emotional journey as two daughters struggle to understand how someone they loved so much could hurt them so badly.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A 13-year-old's powerful and disturbing diary entries have Dr. Phil very concerned. Trisha says her daughter's pain stems from her father's discipline. How do you know if your discipline crosses the line into abuse?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil delves into a tragic story that spanned several decades, shattered lives and left one person behind bars. Fourteen children were held captive by a man who called himself The Messiah … a man who was also their father. Jeanne says she was raised in this environment, which the authorities called cult-like, and that she and her siblings were starved, beaten and had no schooling. In a tear-jerking revelation, Jeanne tells Dr. Phil that she was forced to perform unthinkable sexual acts with her own father, beginning when she was just 5 years old and ending when she was 27. Jeanne may be a victim of horrible cruelty, but her sisters, Miriam and Sarah, say they can’t forgive her for the pain she caused them. Find out why these siblings are estranged, and why Sarah says she’s nervous just sitting next to Jeanne on Dr. Phil’s stage. It’s been 20 years since Jeanne’s father was arrested, but she and her family say the effects of abuse still linger. Can these siblings ever get closure on their horrific past?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil tackles two news stories that have captivated millions. First up, is it ever appropriate to confront your child’s bullies? That’s what James Jones says he did when he boarded his 12-year-old daughter, Chatari’s, school bus, and the video of his tirade went viral! James says some of the students terrorized his child, who suffers from cerebral palsy, and his actions resulted in two second-degree misdemeanor charges against him. CNN contributor Roland Martin joins the show, and he says James should be named Father of the Year for protecting Chatari, who was reportedly hit, called names and had condoms thrown at her. Roland goes head-to-head with attorney Areva Martin, who says James’s behavior was unwarranted. Did this dad cross the line? What does Dr. Phil think? Plus, the disappearance of David Hartley reads like a murder mystery. His wife, Tiffany, says they were on vacation when David was shot in the head by Mexican pirates while jet skiing. His body was never recovered, and Mexican authorities question if the event really occurred. Some people wonder if Tiffany was involved, but she maintains her innocence. Find out why she declined a lie detector test, and hear Dr. Phil’s strong message for her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sisters Rylie, 23, and Lenae, 26, claim their father, Leonard, was extremely physically and verbally abusive during their childhood and that they lived in constant fear of him — allegations he absolutely denies. They also claim their mother, Susan, did not protect them from him. Rylie claims the alleged abuse was so damaging that she believes it’s the cause of her diagnosis of Borderline Personality Disorder. Lenae says the many years of alleged verbal abuse have led to self-loathing and even an eating disorder. Leonard admits to having a tough disciplinary style, but refutes his daughters accusations — even saying they’ve blown everything out of proportion.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From spending $600,000 on 3-year-old beauty queens, to pushy stage sisters and an ambitious boxing coach — today's guests say they go to the extremes to help the youngest members of their family excel. Meet two fathers, one whose full-time job is managing his tiny stars' careers, and the other who hand makes each and every one of his 4-year-old daughter's costumes. Are these dads bonding with their daughters or simply pushing too hard? Plus, meet several women who defiantly criticize child beauty pageants. And, hear from one overzealous sister and the father of a boxing champion once ranked first in the world. Can Dr. Phil convince these guests to step aside and strive for balance in their children's lives?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lauren says she resents her parents, Laura and John, claiming that as a teen, Laura stole her identity and racked up $50,000 in debt – a claim Laura denies – and that John had affairs on her mom and drank alcohol and used drugs with her and her teenage friends. John admits he was the “party dad,” but claims he was just trying to bond with Lauren. But is this just the tip of the iceberg? Dr. Phil drops the bombshell that John spent nearly two years behind bars and was dubbed the “Breast Pump Bandit” by his city’s local news. It’s a Dr. Phil episode you cannot miss!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In part one, amid claims of drinking and doing drugs with teenagers and extramarital affairs, Dr. Phil revealed that Lauren’s father, John, had been dubbed the “Breast Pump Bandit” by his city’s local news, for stealing thousands of dollars’ worth of breast pumps and selling them online --and admitted to taking Lauren on some of his shoplifting heists. Today, John admits that he’s addicted to Xanax and crack cocaine, and to stealing from Lauren’s mother to support his habit. Lauren says she wants her mom to kick him out of their lives once and for all. How does Laura respond? It’s a shocking conclusion you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Frankie and his former wife, Karen Leanne Dees, made headlines and were the subject of a Lifetime movie called Baby Brokers. The couple was accused of scamming would-be parents out of thousands of dollars by promising them one of their unborn babies in exchange for financial support. Frankie says he and Karen had 10 children, and he claims eight of those children were placed for adoption without his knowledge. His daughters Sandy and Ava claim their biological father not only knew about the adoption scam, but they say they believe he was the mastermind behind it. What was Frankie’s involvement? Sandy claims her biological parents “sold her like a piece of furniture for $5,000.” Find out what happens when Sandy meets her biological father for the first time.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Sandy and Ava, who confronted their biological father, Frankie, about his alleged involvement in an adoption scam. Sandy and Ava claim Frankie and his former wife, Karen Leanne Dees, “sold” their children in an adoption scam, where they promised prospective parents they could adopt one of their unborn babies in exchange for financial support. Their brother, Dalton, says he was Frankie and Karen’s ninth child who was adopted. He claims his biological parents put a $3,000 price tag on his head and that he was the last child “sold” before his mother was arrested. Plus, meet one of the prospective parents who adopted one of Karen’s children. Find out why she says Frankie belongs behind bars. And, Frankie’s youngest child, Ava, says she was raised by her father after her mother was arrested by the FBI -- but she says she did not have a better life than her siblings. Find out a dark secret Ava reveals about her father, and why she wants him to take a polygraph test. What happens when Dr. Phil offers Frankie the opportunity to take a polygraph test?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: How has the role of the man evolved in the modern family? One woman claims her husband provides her with everything—except love and affection. He says he only knows how to provide financially. Can Dr. Phil help them find a balance and save their marriage of 17 years? Then, one guest entered into a new relationship after leaving his wife and kids. Now, his guilt is causing him to lie, manipulate and become physically abusive. Find out what Dr. Phil has to say to these men about the true measure of a man’s success in a relationship!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Millions were inspired by the first “Role of the Man” show. Now, Dr. Phil is making it an ongoing series and checking in with past guests. Remember the husband who provided everything for his wife…except intimacy? He’s back! Are they now sleeping in the same bed? Then, you’ll hear from the man who wanted his wife to have sex with him on demand. Did he change his selfish ways or is he still in the doghouse? Plus, what’s a mama’s boy to do when his wife insists he cut the umbilical cord once and for all?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Attention men: If you have a child on the way, or dream of being a father some day, you don’t want to miss this show! A little-known law could keep you from having any rights to your child. Bryce and Esther dated for one month before Esther became pregnant. Bryce says he wanted to marry Esther and raise their child together, but Esther says she wasn’t ready to be a mother. When they broke up, Esther decided to place the baby for adoption without informing Bryce. When Bryce finally learned his daughter was born, she was already seven days old and placed with another family. Now Bryce is fighting to get his child back, but because of an obscure law in some states, he has lost his rights as a father. What law did Bryce fail to comply with that even the lawyers in this case weren’t previously aware of? Is he unfit as a father, or is this law unconstitutional? Bryce and Esther’s lawyers give their opinion. Plus, the grandparents at odds over Esther’s decision face off. Don’t miss this heated discussion and learn more about the Putative Fathers Registry!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Christina, 21, and her younger sister, Carlie, 13, say they had a close relationship with their father, Michael, until two years ago when he decided to transition to a female. Michael was a police officer, soldier and loving parent who lived his life as a male for 40 years. Now, he wants his daughters to call him Mom, because he says Dad is gone, but they refuse. Michael, who prefers to be called Kayla, says she wants to explain to her daughters why she's living as a woman, but they've never given her the chance. The last time Christina saw her father was two years ago when he showed up at her work in lace and blue jeans to break the news that he's transgendered. When she sees Kayla onstage, does she greet her with open arms? Next, Carlie joins her sister and father. She says she wants her old dad back, but will she feel the same after seeing Kayla? Can the father-daughter bond be turned into a mother-daughter one? Be prepared for an emotional journey as two daughters struggle to understand how someone they loved so much could hurt them so badly.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A 13-year-old's powerful and disturbing diary entries have Dr. Phil very concerned. Trisha says her daughter's pain stems from her father's discipline. How do you know if your discipline crosses the line into abuse?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil delves into a tragic story that spanned several decades, shattered lives and left one person behind bars. Fourteen children were held captive by a man who called himself The Messiah … a man who was also their father. Jeanne says she was raised in this environment, which the authorities called cult-like, and that she and her siblings were starved, beaten and had no schooling. In a tear-jerking revelation, Jeanne tells Dr. Phil that she was forced to perform unthinkable sexual acts with her own father, beginning when she was just 5 years old and ending when she was 27. Jeanne may be a victim of horrible cruelty, but her sisters, Miriam and Sarah, say they can’t forgive her for the pain she caused them. Find out why these siblings are estranged, and why Sarah says she’s nervous just sitting next to Jeanne on Dr. Phil’s stage. It’s been 20 years since Jeanne’s father was arrested, but she and her family say the effects of abuse still linger. Can these siblings ever get closure on their horrific past?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil tackles two news stories that have captivated millions. First up, is it ever appropriate to confront your child’s bullies? That’s what James Jones says he did when he boarded his 12-year-old daughter, Chatari’s, school bus, and the video of his tirade went viral! James says some of the students terrorized his child, who suffers from cerebral palsy, and his actions resulted in two second-degree misdemeanor charges against him. CNN contributor Roland Martin joins the show, and he says James should be named Father of the Year for protecting Chatari, who was reportedly hit, called names and had condoms thrown at her. Roland goes head-to-head with attorney Areva Martin, who says James’s behavior was unwarranted. Did this dad cross the line? What does Dr. Phil think? Plus, the disappearance of David Hartley reads like a murder mystery. His wife, Tiffany, says they were on vacation when David was shot in the head by Mexican pirates while jet skiing. His body was never recovered, and Mexican authorities question if the event really occurred. Some people wonder if Tiffany was involved, but she maintains her innocence. Find out why she declined a lie detector test, and hear Dr. Phil’s strong message for her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: How much should looking good factor into your relationship? Today’s guests say appearance matters, and their mate is not up to their standards! Sandi says after six years of marriage, she misses her husband, Otto’s, six-pack. He says working -- not working out -- is a priority for him, and nothing will satisfy his wife, who rates herself a 20 out of 10. But the couple does agree on one thing: whatever Sandi wants, Sandi gets. Will Otto agree to hit the gym? Then, Dawn worked hard to shed 150 pounds, and when the new svelte Dawn met Paul, sparks flew! He thought she was hot -- until she undressed. What is she hiding? Plus, discover why Dr. Phil wrestles with his decision to help Dawn and Paul. And, Cynthia says she’s embarrassed by her boyfriend’s outdated wardrobe, and refuses to be seen with him in public! Can a professional makeover change her opinion?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From accusations of cheating to criticizing their clothing and secret DNA tests -- these wives say their husbands could be the worst in America! Brian and Nicole recently celebrated their first wedding anniversary, but the newlyweds say there is already trouble in paradise. Nicole says that Brian is so controlling, that he must know her whereabouts at all times and will call her up to 25 times in a row to make sure she’s not cheating. Brian admits he doesn’t trust Nicole, and simply wants her to respect him. Growing frustrated, the couple says unless they come to a compromise, they are prepared to part ways. What does Dr. Phil say they must do to get their marriage back on track? Then, Shaunna says she feels like a prisoner in her own home. She says her husband terrifies her and controls every aspect of her life, from how she dresses and styles her hair, to when she can leave the house and whom and what she can look at in public. Aaron says he's just trying to help his wife, but then why is he a no-show on Dr. Phil's stage? Can Dr. Phil help Shaunna find her way out? Plus, learn the steps you must take to ensure a safe exit from an abuser’s tight grip.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sue says her husband of 12 years, Andy, is verbally abusive and that she’s so scared of him, she remains submissive -- including getting drunk and having sex with him -- to keep the peace. She says, “If he’s going to kill me, he’s going to kill me. I feel like I’m already dead.” So, why is she worried that Andy will leave her? Andy admits that he can be a bully, loses his temper and calls Sue vile names, but he says the duties of a wife are to have sex, cook and clean -- and Sue doesn't carry her weight around the house. After breaking up numerous times, why do they keep reuniting? And, hear from Sue’s two adult children. What do they say contributes to the chaos in their mom and Andy’s relationship? Is there hope for this couple’s marriage, or should they cut ties?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shara claims that her newlywed husband, Luke, is a “mean, insecure know-it-all” who won’t let her own a cell phone, hold a job or leave the house alone -- and also dictates how she should dress and wear her makeup. Luke denies all of Shara’s allegations and claims that she is “no angel” and has a vicious temper. Can this marriage be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie says her husband, Brian, was in a tragic work accident in 2015 when he fell from a 68-foot crane. She says he was paralyzed from the knees down and claims he has stopped trying to live life. Natalie claims that since the accident, Brian has treated her and their 13-year old son, Jacob, like his slaves instead of his family. Natalie says her marriage with Brian has changed, and they don’t know how to communicate with one another. Brian says his family doesn’t understand what he is going through and that he is in too much pain to move. Brian also says Natalie’s parents, Sharyn and Dave, are too involved in his family’s lives, which is causing tension. Sharyn and Dave say they were trying to help their daughter since Natalie took on all of the responsibilities in her household.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil talks to controlling guests and the loved ones who feel trapped by them. Jeffrey hates that his wife of seven months, Mindy, goes out clubbing with her younger friends, who he says are a bad influence on her. Mindy leaves the kids with Jeffrey's 16-year-old daughter and parties until 6:00 a.m., while he works the night shift. Mindy calls Jeffrey “a warden,” and says if he had his way, she’d never leave the house. Then, Jason claims his wife, Terrie, is lazy. He says he has to clean the house, do chores, take care of the kids and balance two checkbooks! Terrie says her large chest and arthritis prevent her from doing household tasks. Can Jason get his wife to clean up her act?

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Peaceful Jack Slade changes into a vengeful gunman after he's attacked by a thief.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A marshal takes on a mission to retrieve a stolen wedding dress while an outlaw gang runs wild.

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.desc: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Billy Benson's landlady wants either her back rent or a wedding ring!

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: One suspect takes his chances in a ravine after he leads deputies to a dead end. A vehicle search turns a family outing into a trip to jail. The cops inspect a disturbance between a dad and his son.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed “Danger” is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed car chase switches gears when the driver flees on foot. Tempers flare between neighbors after kids get physical. A nervous driver becomes irate after the police search his passenger.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer is forced to subdue a suspect with his baton. A man asks deputies to give him back his drugs before taking him to jail. A man under the influence causes a disturbance at an apartment complex.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An evasive driver tells the police that he’s the victim of a very bad girl. A pregnant lady makes some questionable choices. A robbery suspect finds some comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers investigate a fiasco at a fast food restaurant. A routine pullover results in a drug possession arrest. A vehicular pursuit results in an ill fated foot chase, the suspect is taken to jail for an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn. Officers are forced to intervene when a jilted lover can’t take a hint. A nervous man attempts to hide his crime.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A car thief is foiled by dreams of fame. In order to catch an oblivious driver's attention, officers are forced to disable his car. A woman tries to evade arrest by giving deputies a fake name.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police arrest a bicycling dealer and his client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn. A father threatens his daughter and her boyfriend with a knife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers enlist the help of a K-9 unit after suspects in a dangerous high-speed chase abandon their car in a residential area. A woman with visible injuries tells the Officer that her husband assaulted her after they left a drive-in. A woman sprays her boyfriend with mace when she sees him with another woman.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner is held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells Deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man runs from Police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: The new chief in town oversees a series of undercover drug buys. Officers arrest a drunken man who can’t stop talking. A domestic abuse suspect admits to laying the smack down on her mooching husband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck after a donut shop robbery. Deputies are dispatched when a wife attacks her husband with an unknown object. Deputies respond to a mother and son knife fight.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Multiple suspects spill out in a mad scramble when their vehicle flips over in a pursuit. A distraught man complains that a stranger tried to lasso him with a metal necklace. A driver has trouble staying in his lane after a lousy night of poker.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman needs police help when her boyfriend threatens her with a knife. A zebra runs loose on the streets of Sacramento County. A man wants to use a stick and a rock to settle a dispute.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple attempts to give the cops the slip during a storm. A motorist tries to resist deputies, but his moves are outdated. Police encounter a suspiciously sweaty man on an eerily dim street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An irate man has trouble accepting the truth. Officers question a cagey group in an effort to confirm their suspicions. An argument between Mom and Dad becomes violent, so the kids call the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over narcotics. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect claims he would have gotten away with his crime if it hadn't been for his girlfriend. Officers are called when a mother’s job hunt unravels. Deputies confront a nervous man with bad habits.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers assist a bondsman after a fugitive and his girlfriend refuse to surrender. An officer pulls over a teen who attempts to ingest a bag of marijuana while the officer isn’t looking. An officer makes an arrest after the female suspect has an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An extremely understanding cop gives a resistant suspect too many chances. A driver reminds us why we should never let a friend borrow our car. A man with a supped-up vehicle tells an awful lie to police.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A sibling calls authorities when his belligerent brother refuses to leave. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle at a local gas station.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers recover a small bag of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A foot chase gets complicated when the suspect proves he’s not in good health. A suspect believes he doesn’t need to follow the rules of the road. A man calls the police on his ex-girlfriend when she makes a moving mistake.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A fleeing vehicle goes for a spin when officers execute a perfect PIT maneuver. Cops try to flush out a suspect who barricades himself inside a donut shop. Officers hit the meth mother lode when they stop a truck in a downpour.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A drunk driver rams into a pursuing police car. A man on a bike flees an area known for drug activity on a bike. A sniffling man attempts to hide a baggie with narcotics under his shirt.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is reported by his ex-girlfriends mother. Officers raid a home looking for a dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A cyclist gets booked for trying to split when officers pull him over for a traffic violation. Two brothers struggle to explain why they took off in their truck when they saw the cops. A man takes a swing at his sister because she refuses to mow the lawn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle pursuit ends in a take down and recovery of additional evidence. A store employee flags down an officer who steps in to make a theft related arrest. An officer is accompanied by several units in pursuit of a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A dangerous pursuit between Officers and a known meth dealer ends in an arrest. A suspect with several felony warrants is apprehended without incident. A pursuit involving a stolen motorcycle exceeds speed of 100mph.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A vehicular pursuit in Florida comes to a head when the driver careens into a ditch. An officer responds to a troubling domestic call. An intoxicated brawler is taken into custody.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom. A prostitute fresh out of jail protests that he’s not trying to return to his old career.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies assist border patrol in pursuit of a vehicle that has blown checkpoint and its tires. A drunk woman is pulled over not knowing she is missing a tire.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: During an arrest, a suspect decides to pop the question to his girlfriend. An abandoned house becomes the target of burglary. Two brothers’ dispute over a business matter leads to violence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers try to make sense of a store transaction turned wrestling match. An intoxicated woman calls the cops when her boyfriend tries to flush her late husband's ashes. A shirtless man with a nasty attitude defies officers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a brutal car wreck. The cops question a robbery suspect who claims to be the real victim. Officers find a man who says that he suffers from a disorder that causes him to run away.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. A intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he’s not trying to run away. A jealous boyfriend terrorizes his girlfriend and her parents.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers arrest a female driver for drug possession and whose mother scolds her before she’s carted off to jail. An officer arrests a man who alleges that he’s waiting for his date for outstanding warrants and a stolen vehicle. An officer takes a known prostitute to jail.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A DWI suspect flees from police because he thinks they won’t believe his version of events. A suspect is stopped for jaywalking but when questioned she can’t keep still. A naive man leaves his car unattended for a moment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A chase ends when a driver-less vehicle goes headfirst into an apartment complex. A swift suspect can’t scamper fast enough to evade police. On routine patrol, officers stumble upon a 7-year-old boy who left home alone.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: ¡Echa un vistazo a las recopilaciones de Angry Birds Toons! Cada recopilación contiene varios episodios de tus series favoritas, como Angry Birds, Piggy Tales y Stella.

programme.title: Alex y el Mar
programme.desc: Alex vive en una isla y se prepara cada mañana un desayuno mientras Rocco y Lili juegan juntos. Un científico holográfico aparece en una máquina y le dice a Alex cual es su misión para el día: Alex ha de fotografiar un delfín. Descubrirá todo tipo de vida submarina. Después de un rato, Alex ve un delfín y toma una foto de él. Luego, regresa de vuelta a casa. Al final, una voz explica las características de los delfines.

programme.title: Pintxo Contra el Cambio Climatico
programme.desc: Pintxo es un duende travieso, junto a él nos divertiremos y jugaremos en casa mientras respetamos nuestro planeta y hacemos frente al cambio climático. Descubre cómo las pequeñas acciones en casa; como ahorrar agua y apagar luces pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: BarryTiger
programme.desc: BarryTiger es una serie animada en 3D vibrante y cautivadora, diseñada para niños de 1 a 8 años, que da vida a aventuras cotidianas a través de música pegajosa y encantadora. Con una variedad de personajes coloridos y temas ricos y diversos, la serie muestra los momentos alegres de la vida de la familia BarryTiger. La producción musical de alta calidad, con melodías excepcionales, arreglos sobresalientes y actuaciones destacadas, añade una capa extra de diversión a las escenas animadas y dinámicas. ¡Prepárate para cantar, bailar y explorar junto a Barry y sus amigos en cada emocionante episodio!

programme.title: Domi Kids
programme.desc: "Domi Kids es una serie musical animada en 3D que da vida a las alegres y cálidas aventuras diarias de la familia Domi, compuesta por cinco integrantes. Con música animada y divertida, y actuaciones de múltiples personajes, el programa ofrece una gran variedad de temas, historias atractivas y escenas diversas. Un equipo profesional de producción musical asegura melodías de primera calidad, arreglos excepcionales y actuaciones vocales destacadas, brindando un festín audiovisual encantador para los niños. El contenido es positivo, entretenido y está diseñado para ayudar a los niños a aprender y explorar el mundo de una manera apropiada para su edad. Además, apoya a los padres en su camino hacia una crianza fácil y placentera, mientras acompaña a los niños en su crecimiento y desarrollo."

programme.title: Peztronauta
programme.desc: Fishtronaut, un pez con traje de agua, viaja por tierra para resolver misterios y ayuda a los espectadores a aprender cómo proteger el medio ambiente.

programme.title: MINITUNS
programme.desc: MINITUNS presenta una selección emocionante y divertida de canciones infantiles, perfectas para disfrutar, bailar y cantar en familia. Un mundo lleno de colores y melodías, diseñado para enseñar a contar, cuidar el planeta y disfrutar del juego.

programme.title: Leo Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger presenta los secretos y las maravillas de la naturaleza y la vida silvestre que nos rodea y estimula la curiosidad y la pasión por la naturaleza en los niños. Con interesantes misiones y aventuras, los niños se divierten mientras aprenden lecciones positivas.

programme.title: Iron Kid
programme.desc: Gaff, Guardián de la Familia Eon y protector del Puño, está huyendo de la asesina a sueldo Belleza Negra y su equipo de Ninjas Robots. Escapa por poco de su ataque y arroja una caja de madera en una cueva de la Zona Prohibida, un área controlada por el Duque von Rhymer, presidente de la Torre de Hierro. La caja contiene el Puño de Eón.

programme.title: Planeta de Niños
programme.desc: Divertida y cautivadora serie educativa y de entretenimiento para niños, que refuerza virtudes fundamentales y modales enseñados a los niños por sus padres y maestros, en la escuela y en casa. Desde la confianza, humildad y el perdón, a la honestidad, responsabilidad, cooperación y dignidad. El show ayuda a los niños a comprender la importancia desde pequeños detalles como ser corteses, hasta a desarrollar grandes virtudes y habilidades, como saber toma de decisiones.

programme.title: Talking Tom Heroes
programme.desc: ¡Los Talking Tom Heroes al rescate! Gracias a algunas mejoras extraordinarias, cristales de poder y nuevos artilugios geniales, tus personajes favoritos de Talking Tom and Friends se han transformado. Ahora, superamigos y héroes asombrosos, ¡están aquí pa

programme.title: Leo Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger presenta los secretos y las maravillas de la naturaleza y la vida silvestre que nos rodea y estimula la curiosidad y la pasión por la naturaleza en los niños. Con interesantes misiones y aventuras, los niños se divierten mientras aprenden lecciones positivas.

programme.title: Papelitos
programme.desc: La serie animada “papelitos” cuenta de una manera divertida a los más pequeñitos sobre las simpáticas aventuras de unos animales de papel: Un alce llamado Aristóteles y un pájaro carpintero llamado Tuc-Tuc en el país de papel donde todo por completo está hecho de papel. Divertidas aventuras se acompañan con interesantes clases de manualidades donde los espectadores aprenderán como con papel y cartón crear a todos los personajes de la serie utilizando tijeras y pegamento. El proyecto tiene apoyo de la página web donde están presentados todos los moldes y consejos para crear el mundo de papel. De esta manera el espectador participa en el juego que supone la creación y el desarrollo de muchas habilidades prácticas que distraen a los chicos del encierro permanente de la computadora. El proyecto “Papelitos” es una divertida y didáctica alternativa en lugar de pasar tiempo con la computadora. Toda la acción en el dibujo animado es narrada por una voz en off y repleta de ingeniosos chistes. Cada capítulo dura 5 minutos (la versión sin clase – 4 minutos). La técnica de animación – gráficos 3D que imitan al papel.

programme.title: BFF
programme.desc: Las BFF son un grupo de amigas adolescentes que descubren que juntas pueden superar cualquier situación por complicada que sea y convertirse en… ¡mejores amigas para siempre! Sus aventuras están llenas de momentos musicales y situaciones desternillantes interrumpidas constantemente por Shadow, un personaje mágico y travieso que intenta difundir desesperadamente negatividad y “malas vibraciones”. Sin embargo, ¡sus intentos se verán frustrados por las BFF y sus collares de la amistad!

programme.title: Leoncito Alado
programme.desc: LEONCITO ALADO es un canal de canciones infantiles para niños de 1 a 3 años de edad. Aquí podrás encontrar canciones para tranquilizar, entretener y enseñar valores y talentos a nuestros pequeños espectadores.

programme.title: El Mundo de Luna
programme.desc: Curiosa por todo y entusiasmada por la ciencia, Luna, de 6 años, y su hermano Júpiter y su mascota Clyde exploran la naturaleza para conocer el mundo.
