programme.title: El Mundo de Luna
programme.desc: Curiosa por todo y entusiasmada por la ciencia, Luna, de 6 años, y su hermano Júpiter y su mascota Clyde exploran la naturaleza para conocer el mundo.

programme.title: Pim y Pom en el Museo
programme.desc: Pim y Pom, dos gatitos, llevan a los niños a una aventura en el fascinante mundo del arte. Con la fuerza de su imaginación, exploran cuadros de artistas famosos como Vincent van Gogh, Johannes Vermeer, Rembrandt, Seurat y Renoir.

programme.title: Las aventuras de los bebés llorones Lágrimas mágicas
programme.desc: Los Bebés Llorones viven en el mundo de Lágrimas Mágicas donde aprenden juntos lo que es la amistad, el trabajo en equipo y la empatía. Disfruta con ellos aventuras increíbles en mundos llenos de magia. Cada uno de los Bebés Llorones es único, pero todos tienen algo en común: ¡sus lágrimas son mágicas!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Talking Hank esta entusiasmado por su primer dia de trabajo como guardia de seguridad durante la Noche de los Nerditos que se lleva a cabo en la ciudad, pero el trabajo no esta tan repleto de accion como el esperaba.

programme.title: Pintxo Contra el Cambio Climatico
programme.desc: Pintxo es un duende travieso, junto a él nos divertiremos y jugaremos en casa mientras respetamos nuestro planeta y hacemos frente al cambio climático. Descubre cómo las pequeñas acciones en casa; como ahorrar agua y apagar luces pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Glumpers
programme.desc: Si la simple convivencia entre dos personas puede hacer que salten chispas, imagínense lo que podría suceder en una casa habitada por seres con 6 personalidades completamente opuestas. Los Glumpers son una pandilla, un grupo de amigos que viven juntos, las acusadas personalidades de los cuales interactúan continuamente. Si entre los seres humanos una simple discusión en general, va a terminar con sólo un par de insultos, en el caso de los Glumpers puede terminar, en el mejor de los casos, en una explosión atómica.

programme.title: Alex y el Huerto
programme.desc: Cada mañana, la abuela le da una semilla mágica a Alex y él se apresura a la huerta para plantarla. Entonces, va a la fuente a por agua, por lo que puede regar las semillas mágicas. Alex espera con impaciencia para ver como la fruta o vegetal va a crecer. Luego, con destellos de magia, surge de una planta del suelo, y ahí está ... ... un naranjo! Va con una cesta y coge la fruta que van a comer para el almuerzo. Abuela y Alex se sientan a la mesa y comen la fruta o beben su jugo. En Al final, podemos ver y escuchar la explicación de las propiedades básicas de la fruta que acaban de comer.

programme.title: Boom and Reds
programme.desc: Boom & Reds, una serie preescolar. Trata sobre Boom, un cálido y amigable ogro violeta, el cual en cada episodio, intentara averiguar que estan dibujando en el suelo, los reds, una pequeña banda de criaturas de cabezas de champiñones. Desgraciadamente, el echo de que Boom no sea muy inteligente no le ayudará, haciendole pensar en locas sugerencias.

programme.title: MINITUNS
programme.desc: MINITUNS presenta una selección emocionante y divertida de canciones infantiles, perfectas para disfrutar, bailar y cantar en familia. Un mundo lleno de colores y melodías, diseñado para enseñar a contar, cuidar el planeta y disfrutar del juego.

programme.title: Leo Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger presenta los secretos y las maravillas de la naturaleza y la vida silvestre que nos rodea y estimula la curiosidad y la pasión por la naturaleza en los niños. Con interesantes misiones y aventuras, los niños se divierten mientras aprenden lecciones positivas.

programme.title: A cantar con Fluffy la Conejita
programme.desc: ¡Ayuda a Fluffy a resolver los problemas de sus amigos con rimas divertidas y pegadizas!

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: ¡Sigue a Bernard mientras hace un desastre!

programme.title: BFF
programme.desc: Las BFF son un grupo de amigas adolescentes que descubren que juntas pueden superar cualquier situación por complicada que sea y convertirse en… ¡mejores amigas para siempre! Sus aventuras están llenas de momentos musicales y situaciones desternillantes interrumpidas constantemente por Shadow, un personaje mágico y travieso que intenta difundir desesperadamente negatividad y “malas vibraciones”. Sin embargo, ¡sus intentos se verán frustrados por las BFF y sus collares de la amistad!

programme.title: Papelitos
programme.desc: La serie animada “papelitos” cuenta de una manera divertida a los más pequeñitos sobre las simpáticas aventuras de unos animales de papel: Un alce llamado Aristóteles y un pájaro carpintero llamado Tuc-Tuc en el país de papel donde todo por completo está hecho de papel. Divertidas aventuras se acompañan con interesantes clases de manualidades donde los espectadores aprenderán como con papel y cartón crear a todos los personajes de la serie utilizando tijeras y pegamento. El proyecto tiene apoyo de la página web donde están presentados todos los moldes y consejos para crear el mundo de papel. De esta manera el espectador participa en el juego que supone la creación y el desarrollo de muchas habilidades prácticas que distraen a los chicos del encierro permanente de la computadora. El proyecto “Papelitos” es una divertida y didáctica alternativa en lugar de pasar tiempo con la computadora. Toda la acción en el dibujo animado es narrada por una voz en off y repleta de ingeniosos chistes. Cada capítulo dura 5 minutos (la versión sin clase – 4 minutos). La técnica de animación – gráficos 3D que imitan al papel.

programme.title: El Mundo de Luna
programme.desc: Curiosa por todo y entusiasmada por la ciencia, Luna, de 6 años, y su hermano Júpiter y su mascota Clyde exploran la naturaleza para conocer el mundo.

programme.title: Planeta de Niños
programme.desc: Divertida y cautivadora serie educativa y de entretenimiento para niños, que refuerza virtudes fundamentales y modales enseñados a los niños por sus padres y maestros, en la escuela y en casa. Desde la confianza, humildad y el perdón, a la honestidad, responsabilidad, cooperación y dignidad. El show ayuda a los niños a comprender la importancia desde pequeños detalles como ser corteses, hasta a desarrollar grandes virtudes y habilidades, como saber toma de decisiones.

programme.title: Leoncito Alado
programme.desc: LEONCITO ALADO es un canal de canciones infantiles para niños de 1 a 3 años de edad. Aquí podrás encontrar canciones para tranquilizar, entretener y enseñar valores y talentos a nuestros pequeños espectadores.

programme.title: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: Rita and Chris must protect Donnie 'Dogs' Dibarto from a notorious mobster named Tony 'Toe Tag' Torino, when he attempts to muscle in on a piece of Dibarto's action and Dibarto decides to turn state's evidence. programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: What began with twenty-four of the world’s top featherweights is now down to the final four as they battle in a one-night tournament to crown the Last Featherweight Standing.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Over the course of a year, twelve of the best GLORY featherweights will compete opposite twelve of the best RISE featherweights in a series of knockout bouts until one fighter becomes the Last Featherweight Standing.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Four more will punch their tickets into the next round as GLORY & RISE search for the baddest featherweight on the planet in this year long tournament. On the GLORY side, top ranked German Polish fighter Denis Wosik (40-9-1, 9 KO) takes on Thai veteran Suarek (107-40-11, 39 KO) and Italy’s Achraf Aasila (53-13, 13 KO) meets France’s Lounis Saing (19-4-1, 12 KO). Meanwhile on the RISE side of the bracket, Japan’s Yutaro Asahi (17-9, 4 KO) clashes with Spain’s Eduardo Catalin (17-3-1) and top Japanese prospect Yura Kono (15-1, 7 KO) goes up against China’s Dexiang Kong (35-10). In addition to the Last Featherweight Standing matchups, Shiro Matsumoto (53-17-4, 18 KO) defends his RISE bantamweight title against top challenger Masahi Kumura (24-7, 12 KO) and Australian KO artists Chadd Collins (64-18-2, 32) defends his RISE super lightweight championship against the great Kento Haraguchi (25-4-1, 14 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY featherweight world champion Petch (175-40-3, 27 KO) will rematch KO artist Abraham Vidales (18-4, 14 KO) and Portuguese sensation Miguel Trindade (64-8, 26 KO) will look to avenge his 2023 loss to the always entertaining Berjan Peposhi (32-6, 16 KO). Former GLORY title contender & leading Japanese fighter Kento Haraguchi (28-6-1, 18 KO) will go up against talented newcomer Hiroki Kasahara (39-8, 17 KO) while popular South Korean veteran Sung-hyun Lee (71-13-2, 17 KO) takes on top young prospect Yura Kono (17-1, 9 KO). In addition, the seven-fight card will be headlined by Shiro Matsumoto (55-17-4, 19 KO) defending his RISE bantamweight title against Koki Osaki (38-6-1, 21 KO). In the co-main event, budding superstar Ryujin Nasukawa (17-2, 8 KO) and heavy-hitter Kaito Hasegawa (17-2, 13 KO) battle for the vacant RISE super flyweight championship.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: Papilles
programme.desc: De Nice à Grasse, en passant par les villages de l'arrière-pays, Jacques Maximin, qui fut le premier chef étoilé dans un restaurant de palace, nous emmène sur son territoire d'adoption, déguster quelques pépites gastronomiques. Entre souvenirs, témoignages et gourmandises, Jacques Maximin se livre, et révèle l'homme derrière le personnage.

programme.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 05
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sex addict Princess wants to confess to her fiance about her secret double life.

programme.title: 10 Kilos in the Trunk
programme.desc: Tonya needs to make some quick cash for the holidays, and takes a job transporting cocaine. On the way to the drop-off, her car breaks down in the middle of nowhere. While walking to a gas station for help, she is stopped by a police officer, and arrested for several warrants. Now in jail, Tonya, gets her friend Monica to make the delivery. Monica must get the car fixed, avoid a thief looking to steal the product, and make the delivery by the deadline or both will face deadly consequences.

programme.title: Messy
programme.desc: After being sent away to prison for possessing a firearm, Meek Richardson returns home to the DMV to find out his associate Kevin, is killed. Meek seeks to find the truth about his friend’s death, and finds that his enemies are closer than it seems.

programme.title: Money Gang Lit
programme.desc: Hakeem Benson, a down-on-his-luck videographer, is evicted and adrift. He takes a risky music video gig for Bull Dawg, a notorious kingpin. But when a respected gang member is murdered, Hakeem is falsely accused and targeted. Now, in a city on fire, he's fighting for his life and meaning amidst the chaos.

programme.title: Induced
programme.desc: An expectant couple heads to a remote cabin to have a natural childbirth, but comes under attack from a predatory midwife who will stop at nothing to snatch their unborn child from them.

programme.title: Till Death Do Us 2
programme.desc: The fates of Tamara, TJ, and even Marcus himself hang in the balance after the bloody kitchen shooting. Did anyone survive? Will Pastor Marcus's mysterious powers intervene? Meanwhile, Jessica, TJ's ex-wife, faces scrutiny for her past actions and the future of their children. With the threat of child protective services looming, the clock is ticking to find answers and rebuild shattered lives.

programme.title: Toxic Affair
programme.desc: A young woman abandoned by her mother and raised by her father has a miscarriage which derails her life. In an attempt to find support, she seeks out her married sister, only to find herself in a toxic affair.

programme.title: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Blake, a man on the verge of marriage who becomes ensnared in a dangerous game of deception and revenge orchestrated by his vengeful ex, London. As their past resurfaces, he is forced to confront hidden secrets and navigate London's sinister manipulations, leading to explosive confrontations and heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Bloodline Secrets
programme.desc: Thirty-three-year-old Keisha is engaged to be married to the man of her dreams, Joseph. Joseph believes he’s ready for marriage with the love of his life but his best friend, John, has his doubts about Keisha’s faithfulness. When family secrets come out of the shadows, it puts their marriage and lives in jeopardy.

programme.title: Counteract
programme.desc: Amateur and immature social media influencer, Sylvia Shaw has set out to aide her struggling family from financial ruin. Doing so, she is lured into working for a mysterious company that promises fame and great wealth. But soon realizes, her new employer is a mystery, for many reasons.

programme.title: Only 48
programme.desc: When Tracy Harris is abducted and held for ransom, her father Keith has only 48 hours to deliver $500,000. Forced back into the criminal world he tried to escape; Keith faces dangerous alliances and hidden truths in order to save his daughter.

programme.title: Something Old
programme.desc: With her wedding days away, Kara agrees to meet her ex, Malik, for what she swears is just one last goodbye. But Malik isn’t looking for closure—he wants her back, and he’s not taking no for an answer. What starts as a simple meetup at a hotel turns into a dangerous game of obsession and control. As Kara’s fiancé Jordan uncovers the truth with help from her maid of honor, time’s running out.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Karmen, a successful businesswoman is secure and thriving in every part of her life, except for love. She downloads a dating app and seems to have found Mr. Right in Jermaine, but her best friends warn her that he might be a scammer. As Karmen falls deeper, she slowly falls victim to a network of lies and deceit, that could cost her life.

programme.title: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: On her birthday, Summer is publicly humiliated when her fiancé, Chance, and her best friend, Portia, reveal their affair. Seeking revenge, she sabotages their honeymoon with the help of her friend Danisha. A deadly game of cat-and-mouse ensues, with betrayal, violence, and unexpected twists. Ultimately, Summer must confront the consequences of her actions as she fights for her life and seeks justice.

programme.title: The Killing Secret
programme.desc: The outside looking in, Daniel and his wife Brenda appeared to have it all together, but smiles can be deceiving, and kisses can be poison. A healthy marriage is difficult to attain and destroy, but not when secrets are intertwined in the vows, especially one that can kill.

programme.title: Savage Pampas
programme.desc: Wagon master Taylor drives a shipment of prostitutes through the wilderness of Argentina to an encampment of very lonely men.

programme.title: Tunes of Glory
programme.desc: Major Jock Sinclair has been in this Highland regiment since he joined as a boy piper. During the Second World War he was made acting Commanding Officer, but now the regiment has returned to Scotland, and a new commanding officer is to be appointed. Jock’s own cleverness is pitted against his new commanding officer, his daughter, his girlfriend, and other officers.

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods.

programme.title: Death in the Garden
programme.desc: Adventurer Shark comes to a small village near a diamond-miners' camp, and local police arrest him, accusing him of having committed a bank robbery in a neighboring town. The police also confiscate the diamond mine for the state, which incites the miners to revolt, but they're defeated. Shark, Father Lizzardi, Castin, his daughter, and Djin, a whore Castin loves, flee into the jungle and fight for their lives.

programme.title: Wineman

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Si duda alguna el vino más prestigioso de Portugal es el Oporto, su nombre deriva de Porto, que en portugués quiere decir Puerto, o mejor dicho El Puerto en donde los vinos son envejecidos y desde donde eran desde antiguo embarcados a todos los rincones del Mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: La Margen Izquierda de Burdeos es la región más influyente del mundo.

programme.title: Wineman

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: En este episodio os quiero enseñar el lugar donde trabajo, Jumilla.

programme.title: Wineman

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We're in Zrenjanin, Serbia, again a fantastic stage in the SCL WORLD SERIES TOUR 2024, five events including a super human Yoke race. Who will be the yellow leader for the coming season and take the title with 25 championship points?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first ever SCL in Zambia! The athletes get to take in some of the stunning sights and go on to do events such as Tyre Flip and Log Lift

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition moves to Romania and for the first time this season the athletes compete in rainy conditions which make the events even tougher

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition takes place in Lithunia and world records are once again broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Episode 14 takes place in Estonia where drama and world records will be seen again

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Taking place over 2 days in Malaysia, this is part 1 of the world finals of Strongman Champions League!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League - we find out who is crowned as world champion today in the second part of the final epsiode

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Holland is hosting 12 different countries with 14 of the strongest men in the world for the third stage of the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This stage is in Martinique and eight strongmen from all over the world will compete for the last chance to gather points before the world grand finals in December.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: December 19, 2023 - Welcome to The Orchard Cup - CHAMPIONSHIP NIGHT for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and tonight, the #1 seed Gilbert Gladiators (5-0) face the #2 seed Peoria Pythons (4-1).

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: NCPA Round of 32: San Diego State University vs. Utah Tech University

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: Get ready for an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match featuring the formidable team of Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim against the new pairing of Ryan Miscik and Christie Domoracki. Oncins is a former professional tennis player from Brazil. His partner, Simone Jardim, is a professional pickleball player, a Pickleball Hall of Fame inductee, and was once ranked the number one female player in the world. They face a new team with Ryan Miscik, a pro pickleball player and coach based in Venice, Florida. His partner, Christie Domoracki, is a player located in Boca Grande, Florida. This match brings together a mix of experienced pros and up-and-coming talent for a high-stakes competition on Florida's Paradise Coast.

programme.desc: Pickleball star Ryan Sherry & former NFL linebacker Brandon Siler vs. pickleball star Lew Halski & former NFL linebacker David Pollack.

programme.desc: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Houston Hammers in a mixed team match.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: In this fun night of Tuesday Night Pickleball, the Scottsdale Scorchers go up against the Surprise Stingers!

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Senior Pro’s Andre Mick & Jose Derisi battles against Altaf Merchant & John Cincola at the Naples, Florida.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Watch Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy compete against Eva Welsher and Angela Simon for the gold in this Women's Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023

programme.desc: NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs University of Utah in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023
programme.desc: Pickleball star JW Johnson & pro football player Marcellus Wiley team up against pro-pickler Jorja Johnson & film director and producer John Brenkus.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023
programme.desc: Kyle Yates & Picklebowl host Danny Wuerffel are up against pro-pickleball star Rob Nunnery & American Idol singer Phillip Phillips.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League Season 2 returns to the Jio World Garden in Mumbai for an electrifying Tie 8 showdown. The defending champions, Bengaluru Jawans—led by coach Oliver Strecker and backed by owners Atlee and Priya—return to the court for the first time since their dominant opening night performance. They face a determined Delhi Dilwale squad, coached by Wesley Gabrielsson, who are looking to climb the standings after a hard-fought tie-break victory in their previous outing.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: December 13, 2022 - Live from The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health, it's Tuesday Night Pickleball

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Anna Leigh Waters and James Johnson take on Jorja Johnson and Gabriel Tardio in this Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.

programme.title: World Pickleball Open 2023
programme.desc: November 16 - 18, 2023 at Palm Beach Gardens Tennis & Pickleball Center, all levels of players competed in the World Pickleball Open 2023!

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The high-stakes action of Day 7 in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) features a decisive matchup between Pune United and the Delhi Dilwale. With the semi-final race tightening, both teams are fighting fiercely for vital points.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: It's a "Terrific Tuesday" at the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Day 5 features a critical matchup between the Bengaluru Jawans and the Delhi Dilwale. The stakes are high: Delhi, currently number five on the points table, has a chance to move to number three if the results go their way, while Bengaluru looks to bounce back from a recent loss.

programme.title: The PressBox Party
programme.desc: With Ray Colaiacovo sitting in for Tim Ring, Dave Benz talks about the growing craze of pickleball and how Pickleball first arrived to the masses on national TV via the US Open Pickleball Championship.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023
programme.desc: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you won’t want to miss.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Leigh Waters and Anna Leigh Waters take on Parris Todd and Yana Newell in this Women's Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) action heats up on Day 4 with a crucial clash between the Hyderabad Superstars and Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. The commentary team emphasizes that the winner of this tie has the potential to go level on points with the table toppers, making this a vital match for semi-final qualification.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Sheri Courter and Christine Karges take on Sarah Mitten and Mary Helen Atkins in this Women's Senior Pro Quarterfinal Match.

programme.title: Cutler's Court

programme.title: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Nicola Bellizzi returns to Naples, after spending six years in a juvenile detention centre, determined to get out of his outcast status and become a lawyer. In the neighbourhood, Gaetano, known as Core e' Fierro, is the absolute boss of the guapperia. A clash takes place between the two young men; but the behaviour of Nicola, who defends Gaetano from the commissioner Ajossa who has caught them duelling, gives rise to a deep friendship between the two. After many denials, driven by necessity, Nicola agrees to become a guappo in turn during an initiation at the secret court to which he is introduced by Core e' Fierro. Lucia, Gaetano's woman, feels attracted to Nicola, but the two repress their desire. Ajossa wants to get his hands on Gaetano and sets a trap for Lucia, inducing her to yield to him in order to save her lover, so that the latter, in order to avenge the offence, will make a mistake.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Heating Options
programme.desc: One of the biggest changes I have to adapt to after moving to Colorado is the need for heat. programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: DeWalt Tracksaw Review
programme.desc: Here is my review of the DeWalt Tracksaw. As much as I tried to focus solely on the Track saw, it's nearly impossible not to draw comparisons to the Festool TS line of plunge saws. Let me sum it all up by saying you need to be really picky to find distinctions that will make a real difference to the average woodworker.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Installing a Segmented Cutterhead in a Jointer
programme.desc: Segmented cutterheads are becoming quite popular these days but most tools come with traditional straight knives. So it's very likely that at some point you'll be looking to upgrade to a segmented head, and thankfully you don't have to purchase an entirely new machine. Instead, you can just swap out the cutterhead for a new one.

So it's very likely that at some point you'll be looking to upgrade to a segmented head, and thankfully you don't have to purchase an entirely new machine. Instead, you can just swap out the cutterhead for a new one.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Bunk Bed With Slide
programme.desc: A wall-hanging cabinet to help you organize and store your drill and router bits.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Media Credenza - Now with More Crotch!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: 2018 Holiday Gift Guide

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: How to Fix a BAD Kitchen Cabinet Paint Job
programme.desc: How to fix a bad kitchen cabinet paint job.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Sharp and Attractive Way to Store Kitchen Knives
programme.desc: A great way to safely store kitchen knives, up and out of the way but also easily accessible.

programme.title: FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft
programme.desc: "Learn how to make a Potted Faux Flower Craft as a DIY centerpiece for springtime, bridal showers, baby showers, and more! This video tutorial shows you how to make a faux flower as well as a vase for your brand new bloom. This easy die cut craft is perfect for spring decorating, and unlike real plants, this flower craft is low maintenance and can go anywhere in your home! Be sure to watch this DIY craft tutorial for a spring craft idea you'll love. "

programme.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
programme.desc: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!

programme.title: The Avenging Eagle
programme.desc: Eagle Chief Yoh Xi-hung raises orphans to be his personal killers. One such is Chik Ming-sing who now wants to put his killer life behind him. When the Eagle Clan come after him, a stranger called Cheuk comes to his assistance It turns out that Cheuk is the son of a family who were robbed and murdered by the Eagles. Now they will team up to destroy the evil clan.

programme.title: Wow Signal
programme.desc: On a late summer evening in 1977, Ohio radio astronomers discovered a strong, interstellar signal that is believed by many to be the best evidence of communication from an extraterrestrial civilization.

programme.title: Love at the Christmas Table
programme.desc: Family friends Sam and Kat spend every Christmas Eve at the Children's Table. They grow up together, sharing the highs and lows of young adulthood. And at thirty, Sam realizes that Kat is the one... but he's afraid that the past will get in the way.

programme.title: The Challenge of the Lady Ninja
programme.desc: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, a Chinese woman trains in the covert arts. When she arrives in Hong Kong, she learns that her brother works on behalf the Japanese cause. She then pulls together a team of women warriors to stop her brother

programme.title: Dark Space
programme.desc: When their shuttle is damaged on the way to Centari Five, six friends are forced to crash land on the surface of a mysterious alien planet. Stranded with little hope of rescue, it soon becomes clear that they are not alone. Hunted by the planet's ferociou

programme.title: Especiales Unica Tv
programme.desc: Las Casas Releas se han convertido en referentes de estilo y en promotoras de los diseñadores de cada uno de sus países. Reinas y princesas son una nueva generación de influencers que marcan tendencias e inspiran a millones de mujeres en el mundo.

programme.title: Las 50 Mujeres Más Influyentes
programme.desc: Son las 50 mujeres más influyentes, las que día a día contribuyen a cambiar el mundo en diferentes ámbitos, las que inspiran a miles de mujeres.

programme.title: Las 50 Mujeres Más Influyentes
programme.desc: Las 50 mujeres más influyentes que con su estilo marcan tendencias, que con su modernidad y vanguardismo están haciendo historia en el mundo contemporáneo.

programme.title: Las 50 Mujeres Más Influyentes
programme.desc: Las 50 mujeres más influyentes de la realeza que con su modernidad, tolerancia y compromiso están haciendo historia en el mundo contemporáneo.

programme.title: El Clóset De
programme.desc: Abrimos el clóset de Charlene de Mónaco para ver su evolución de atleta de alto rendimiento a princesa, y para descubrir las claves de su estilo elegante y sofisticado.

programme.title: El Clóset De
programme.desc: Recorremos el clóset de la actriz Cate Blanchett, un ícono de estilo que siempre encanta en las alfombras rojas por su elegancia y glamour.

programme.title: El Clóset De
programme.desc: Abrimos el clóset de la princesa Victoria de Suecia para analizar su personal estilo, sobrio y elegante, marcado por la clase y el glamour.

programme.title: Espléndida
programme.desc: Les explicamos la diferencia entre tonificar y obtener masa muscular, y también les enseñamos a maquillarse para el trabajo. Regresamos a una prenda imprescindible, la chaqueta de cuero.

programme.title: Espléndida
programme.desc: Les presentamos el traje de baño perfecto para cada ocasión. Les recomendamos meriendas balanceadas para los más chicos. El blazer es una prenda imprescindible y les enseñamos a sacarle partido.

programme.title: Espléndida
programme.desc: Les recomendamos tres opciones de desayuno saludable. Les enseñamos a hacer un maquillaje cat eye perfecto. Les damos algunos tips para entretener a sus hijos sin el uso de tabletas y celulares.

programme.title: Espléndida
programme.desc: Les compartimos los secretos más interesantes que guardan los cirujanos plásticos. Les recomendamos diferentes peinados para cabello corto y los mejores ejercicios para quienes odian ir al gimnasio.

programme.title: Vidas Reales
programme.desc: Joven y brillante diplomática. Esposa del heredero al trono de la dinastía más antigua. La historia de la princesa Masako parece escrita por una pluma acostumbrada a narrar grandes leyendas.

programme.title: Vidas Reales
programme.desc: En Vidas Reales repasamos la historia de Farah Diba, la ex emperatriz de Irán, viuda del sha Mohammad Reza Pahlavi y una de las mujeres más discretas y elegantes de las últimas décadas.

programme.title: Vidas Reales
programme.desc: En Vidas Reales, conoceremos la historia de la Infanta Elena de Borbón, la hija mayor de los Reyes de España. Mujer tenaz y persistente en sus propósitos.

programme.title: Vidas Reales
programme.desc: Biografías íntimas y personales sobre la realeza internacional.

programme.title: Top De Estilo
programme.desc: Cada semana podremos analizar muy de cerca el look de las grandes estrellas del espectáculo, al mejor estilo ÚnTV. Una nueva producción original, que nos lleva por todas las alfombras rojas de premios y festivales, todas las premieres y todas las ocasiones que nos acercan a las celebridades y su Top de Estilo.

programme.title: Top De Estilo
programme.desc: Las joyas que lució Reese Whiterspoon en los Golden Globes 2014 con un costo de 3.7 millones de dólares. Cinco looks de Jessica Chastain. Naomi Scott en el estreno de Aladdin... todos esto y mucho más en Top de Estilo.

programme.title: Top De Estilo
programme.desc: El estilo de 5 jóvenes celebridades: Rami Malek, Maisie Williams, Willow Smith, Jackson Wang y Troye Sivan. El look de Kristen Stewart en la premiere de Charlies Angels en Londres.

programme.title: Top De Estilo
programme.desc: La minifalda y cómo la lucen tres famosas con mucho estilo Jennifer Aniston, Taylow Swift y Heidi Klum. Tom Holland es el It boy de la semana. Recordaremos cinco looks icónicos de Emma Watson.

programme.title: Especiales Unica Tv
programme.desc: Un recuento de los sucesos más relevantes y una mirada a la evolución de los protagonistas de la información en los últimos 10 años: realeza, moda, celebridades, y mucho más.

programme.title: Creative Crochet Corner presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Creative Crochet Corner is an online video streaming service all about learning how to crochet! Whether you're a new to crochet just learning the basics or an experienced crocheter looking for a challenge, Creative Crochet Corner is here to help. We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Everything old is new in the hands of the modern quilter. Pattern designer Elizabeth Dackson reinterprets vintage blocks using a modern aesthetic. Brenda Ratliff and Heather Grant trade tips on booking the faculty for quilt events. Modern quilt enthusiast Elizabeth Dackson uses half-square triangles to create dynamic blocks.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: WARNING: The following content depicts excessive charm square usage and may be too exciting for most quilters. In other words, Angela's ready to take on 200+ precuts, and the accompanying placement decisions.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela brings you her laurel wreath quilt, the perfect excuse to showcase your most prized scraps and highlight it all with gorgeous free-motion quilting.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Quilting for charity can be one of the most fulfilling things you can do as a quilter.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: The Industrial Revolution was in full swing and women ventured beyond their homes into the workplace and politics. Angela Wolf creates a luxurious kimono duster inspired by those worn over long, full skirts and dresses. Kathy McMakin uses today's machines to create a precious heirloom baby bonnet you'll treasure.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Time can be an element of jewelry design and this episode is all about speed – quick and easy projects that include prefinished components and unique materials. First, Leslie Rogalski shows how to stitch a suite of variations of finished jewelry using shaped beads and metal fashion components; mix and match for quick designing. Then, Julie Fei Fan Balzer, the host of Make It Artsy, stops by with cork earrings.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Polish it and make it shine. Amy Tan makes pages gleam with foil and shares her favorite tape storage tip. Christine Drumheller adds bling and banners to her memory pages. Joe Rotella creates a shimmering lantern that lights up the nighttime.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: There is no better place to find inspiration than outdoors -- a walk outside can change your whole outlook. Host Julie Fei Fan Balzer opens the show creating leaf luminaires inspired by the outside and great to use outdoors. Then, Erin Gerlach creates a bee or butterfly basin to attract these creatures to your garden. The show closes with a color study -- the color green.

programme.desc: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: For George Kourounis‚ ground zero for stormchasing is Oklahoma City, the capital of´Tornado Alley´.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena – but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather can be experienced at the area the South Americans call the “Fin del Mundo”.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George returns to “Tornado Alley” with 3 fellow stormchasers to see what the 2007 Storm Season will bring.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George experiences the most extreme climates in North America. First he visits the hottest place on the continent – Death Valley, then the coldest – Snag, Yukon.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Geoorge explores Java at the heart of the Ring of Fire.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: “Angry Planet” is there as 3 storms make landfall as hurricanes in the US.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's attempt to turn Sonic into an old man with his newest device backfires, turning him and Tails, and later himself, into babies. Now stuck in a day-care, the infantile Sonic and Tails must try to keep Robotnik under control, while Scratch and Grounder attempt to get him back.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness. But when Robotnik Jr. meets Sonic, he becomes a naturalist and teams up with Sonic to thwart Robotnik's evil scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake. Seeing this, Robotnik convinces the villagers that the little fox belongs in jail, and Tails is forced to flee. With Tails all alone, Scratch and Grounder attack, and Sonic makes a last minute rescue.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver). But Mac escapes before Robotnik installs the final Get Sonic program, and teams up with Sonic and Tails to BLAST Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strengths.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck, breaking through every obstacle S and G put in their way until they save the rebels.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik and a rival named Quark Rex try to cooperate in capturing Sonic. However, Sonic tricks them into becoming enemies, and they try to outdo each other.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts acquires a magic wand and magical gadgets from Wes Weasley (after agreeing to forward all payments to Robotnik), and attempts to master them. Meanwhile, Robotnik tries to change Sonic-themed mobium banknotes into Robotnik banknotes in the Mobius Mint.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and Tails are captured by Grounder and Scratch, Sonic tricks them into letting them escape by reminiscing about how they all met. Several badniks seen early on in this episode later resurfaced in Dr. Robotnik's Mean Bean Machine.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on pursuit with Scratch and Grounder, Sonic and Tails hide in an underground mine which a miser mole think that they are trespassers.

programme.title: Sonic TV
programme.desc: The Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog 24/7

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic must save a family of sloths from Dr. Robotnik's slow-motion ray, but when he himself is slowed down by Scratch and Grounder, Tails and the sloth family must take action.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Desperate to get workers to build a Robotnik statue, Dr. Robotnik opens Casino Night Zone with his pal Smiley but when Sonic stops Scratch and Grounder, Robotnik traps Tails so Sonic has to make a choice to save his pal.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik imprisons a satirical cartoonist named Sketch Lampoon for making fun of him in his comic book, much to the anger of Sonic, his biggest fan. Sonic purposely allows his own capture as well, but does not expect to be placed in a maximum-security jail cell. With Robotnik angrily sends Sonic in the cell for interfering with his plans once again.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch, Grounder and Coconuts set up a chili-dog trap which then resulted with Tails been captured by a mysterious person so Sonic has to find Tails and for Robotnik and co to capture Sonic.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While Scratch and Grounder try to catch Sonic using a Suction plate, two aliens, one being a prince, crash lands on Mobius. Sonic meets the prince when he finds out that the prince's baby brother would blow up Mobius which Sonic must save.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A country and western singer released a song about Sonic which is making Dr. Robotnik mad and builds a music destroyer robot.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An energetic salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik numerous gadgets to help Scratch and Grounder capture Sonic. However, Robotnik later comes to regret it when Weaseley's gadgets keep backfiring.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda, and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: En route to stop a train of explosives from arriving at Robotnik's munition factory, Sonic and Tails must deal with a duo of bears named Big Griz and Big Mike after Scratch and Grounder tell them that Sonic and Tails are the enemies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik takes Professor Von Schlemmer hostage and uses his growth machine to try and enlarge himself. However, the machine backfires, and enlarges Tails instead in nearby Wienerville. Sonic must keep the famished Tails from getting into more danger as Robotnik tricks the citizens into thinking that Sonic is the villain, while Robotnik is the hero planning to save the city.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home to ensure his safety, Robotnik finds out and creates a robot fox family, who pose as Tails' long-lost parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When overweight, elderly superhero Captain Rescue bungles in his attempts to help Sonic, he grows tired of his incompetence. Robotnik then uses Captain Rescue to successfully imprison Sonic in an impenetrable force field, and Tails and Captain Rescue must save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch suffers a blow to the head and believes that he is his favorite television character, Edgar Eagle. Sonic uses this to his advantage in preventing another of Robotnik's schemes.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: There is a Sonic Appreciation Day happening where Sonic is the guest in a hotel. However, someone steals his power sneakers and now Sonic and Tails have to find the culprit.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him and they soon find themselves spinning through interdimensional limbo.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik opens up a resort to make the resident Mobians his slaves, Sonic enlists the help of some robots from an area of Mobius called Scrap Valley.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik creates a robot Sonic suit with the intent of ruining the hedgehog's reputation. He forces a lab rat named Laurence to pilot by threatening his parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Dr. Robotnik creates a genius chip so he would have enough brains to rule Mobius, however a computer hacker got hold of it which then the chip landed inside Grounder causing him to be smart.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails, who defends himself the best he can with Home Alone booby traps for Scratch and Grounder. When Tails is finally caught, Sonic speeds back to save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik introduces the Ultra Freeze-O-Matic, announcing his plan to freeze every citizen on Mobius so that he can install Servitude Chips into the frozen citizens and make them unquestionably obedient. Sonic and Tails must foil the scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff unworthy. Sonic, Tails and Surff must avoid the undersea traps and Mobius sea monsters while Sonic rescues the Princess and reunites her with Surff -- making it look like Surff did the whole thing.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik reprograms a machine created by Von Schlemmer capable of turning dreams into reality, unleashing a Nightmare Monster upon Mobius.
