programme.title: Noticias RCN
programme.desc: Todos los sucesos actuales de política, clima, negocios, análisis y los últimos acontecimientos.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Balthazar brings Denisa to Gargamel to baby-sit. But Gargamel loses Denisa in the wood and she and Sassette meet and become friends. Sassette and Denisa work together to free the Smurfs from Gargamel's stewpot, and prove you don't have to be big to be brave.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Smurfette meets this gentle old gypsy woman in the forest and receives a swirling multicoloured dress, she's delighted. How could she know that this woman is really the evil wizard Gargamel in disguise, and that there is a terrible spell on the beautiful dress?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Gallant Smurf
programme.desc: Queen Felicity will not let her son, Prince Godfrey, marry his sweetheart Pricilla. What she wants as a daughter-in-law is a girl who shows her something she's never seen before. When Hogatha learns of this, and also discovers the existence of Grandpa Smurf, she feels confident that she can surprise the Queen with her capture. Of course, Hogatha must first capture Grandpa Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The rain forest of South America is not a place where Vanity Smurf would like to spend his life. And then he starts dancing madly when he gets jungle fever. His dance will have strange results.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs are on a paradise Pacific Island. Well, not exactly paradise, since there is a very active volcano, on which a very active Hefty Smurf risks his life as well as Smurfette's!

programme.title: The Colour Smurf
programme.desc: Spectra is the Colour Fairy, the one whose wheel of colours make all the blues, reds, yellows and greens of the world. She is a friend of Painter Smurf, so when he takes the Smurflings to her home in her absence, the Smurflings fool around with the Colour Wheel... and all the colours disappear from the Earth. What's worse, without colours the Colour Fairy cannot live...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Spring has the Smurfs all competing for Smurfette's affection and Gargamel decides to put a spell on her to help him capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf intervenes and with the help of the foolish Azrael he foils the wizard's plans.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfs try to avoid contact with humans. But this time, Sassette is happy to be friends with a little witch called Melina, whose spells often end up in disaster. And anyway, are witches really human? At any rate, wizards such as Gargamel are.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfs would make delicious meals for the evil wizard Gargamel if it weren't for two things: they're difficult to catch and they're so tiny. Now, suppose there were a formula to change these bite-size snacks into big, juicy square blue meals... Gargamel has an idea...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He’d be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha’s dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: If there is one thing that the evil sorceress Chlorhydris cannot abide, it is other people's happiness. The spectacle of the Smurfs' gentle and song-filled life gets Chlorhydsis' hackles up. She must destroy that tinkling laughter, smother those happy repartees... She plants the root of evil in the forest and soon, no Smurf is on speaking terms with another. Baby Smurf is the only one untouched...

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals
programme.desc: Brainy dons his safari hat and roams the forest to do good deeds for animals. He mostly gives advice to the creatures but balks when he can really save the life of a wildcat being hunted by Gargamel. Nat gives Brainy the courage to free the cat from Gargamel's trap.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clockwork Smurf is feeling so lonely that, out of compassion, Handy Smurf builds a female companion for him. The trouble is, Clockwork Smurfette does not know she's supposed to have eyes only for her mechanical counterpart, or that she should avoid Gargamel....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Scruple, helper to the evil Gargamel, finds the Great Book of Spells in his master's cellar, he asks for the power to be the world's most powerful wizard. This means trouble for the poor little Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Snappy's Way
programme.desc: Did you know that if you catch a troll, he may grant you one wish? It just happens that Aloysius the Troll gets caught in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. Snappy Smurf sets him free and as a reward, gets to make all other Smurfs obey his every whim. Now this brings a lot of trouble to the Smurfs, as Smurflings, sometimes, ask for things that are not good for them... or anybody else.

programme.title: Don Smurfo
programme.desc: Everyone has their own dreams. That of Smurfette is to meet the legendary Don Smurfo, the dashing, witty, swashbuckling hero of many an engrossing tale. The Smurfs shrug at this infatuation. But when a real-life Don Smurfo appears in the village and Smurfette snubs them all in favor of the bragging stranger, they take the matter a little more seriously.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
programme.desc: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Finding Summer Blue Gills
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Dan Lindner roll up their sleeves for a seek and destroy mission to find big summer bluegills.

programme.title: FishON | Spring Walleye
programme.desc: Spring walleye fishing on Kenogamissi Lake. A friendly husband vs wives challenge.

programme.title: FishON | Spring Walleye
programme.desc: Spring walleye fishing on Kenogamissi Lake. A friendly husband vs wives challenge.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Tuna and Yellowtail Fishing on the El Dorado
programme.desc: Shea McIntee and the crew take a two and a half-day trip on one of our all-time favorite charter boats, the El Dorado, out of Long Beach Sportfishing. We fish on San Clemente Island and venture offshore in search of tuna.

programme.title: Catching Bass | Fall Changes
programme.desc: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.

programme.title: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
programme.desc: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Monster Pre-spawn Perch - Missisippi River
programme.desc: Are you ready to learn how you can catch Giant Mississippi River perch! In this episode you'll have everything you need to know to do it yourself. We also took a trip over to Warrior boats to see how that build their boats. Hang onto your hineys!

programme.title: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
programme.desc: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.

programme.title: The Angler's Workshop
programme.desc: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.

programme.title: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — River Bass
programme.desc: FLW Touring pro Justin Kerr joins Jarrett on the Colorado River for a solid day catching large and smallmouth bass

programme.title: The Best of Saltwater Slam
programme.desc: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.

programme.title: Hook 'n Look — Back to School
programme.desc: Lake Chatuge's spotted bass are schooling throughout the open water and Kim capitalizes on the rising fish with a Strike King "Sexy Dawg". When the surface activity slows, he switches to a small Rage Swimmer swimbait to better match the forage size.

programme.title: Hank Parker Fishing
programme.desc: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks 2024
programme.desc: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.

programme.title: The Best of Saltwater Slam
programme.desc: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: We're heading to Lake Gogebic this week to find some GIANT Perch and walleye! Joined by Chris Fish and Justin Soffa, this will surely be a fishing smackdown!

programme.title: Angling Buzz
programme.desc: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.

programme.title: Angling Buzz
programme.desc: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.

programme.title: Pro Vs Joe - Camera Crew Madness
programme.desc: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe Camera Crew Madness

programme.title: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Abby’s Big Bass Revenge-
programme.desc: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure
programme.desc: The next few episodes are special because the crew heads down to the famous Cedros Island fishing for giant Yellowtail, Dorado, and Calico Bass. This trip is nothing new to us; Shea McIntee and the crew have been fishing at Cedros Island for more than a decade and always stay at Cedros Outdoor Adventurers because of their excellent staff, beautiful resort, and fantastic fishing boats and captains.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure, Part Three
programme.desc: We saved the best for last. Part three of our Cedros adventure has fantastic fishing for three different species. Big Yellowtail in the morning, Epic calico bass at the famous Chesters rock during the afternoon, and some epic kelp paddy Dorado fishing on the way home.

programme.title: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks

programme.desc: If you want to catch walleye after walleye including big fish too, plan a trip to Q Lake Lodge. Watch Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson catch fish from dawn until dusk, shallow and deep, using a variety of classic walleye presentation options.

programme.title: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
programme.desc: Paul and Perry kick off an adventurous journey down the Ivanhoe River, heading toward a lake that’s known to deliver steady walleye action. But this time, the fish had other plans. With walleye proving tough to track down, the duo turns to the river’s reliable residents—Northern Pike—to keep the rods bending and the spirits high. Surrounded by stunning scenery, flowing rapids, and beautiful waterfalls, this river run becomes more than just a fishing trip—it’s a reminder that the North’s wild beauty always makes the day worthwhile, no matter what’s biting.

programme.title: FishON! | Experience Fishing at Ole's Adventure Lodge
programme.desc: Join us as we travel to Ole's Adventure Lodge on the picturesque Whitefish Lake, just west of Thunder Bay, Ontario. In this special episode, we shine a spotlight on the Experience Fishing program, dedicated to introducing the joys of angling to children, new Canadians, and women. Witness the excitement of first-time fishing adventures in a breathtaking setting that inspires connection with nature and community.

programme.desc: Agent Carolina is back with a deep-seated animosity. Project Freelancer has a different objective. Carolina starts offs on the wrong foot with the Reds and Blues.

programme.title: Red vs. Blue
programme.desc: Questions arise as the expedition continues with Carolina and the Blues and Reds. Carolina learns things about herself as she continues her investigation. As mysterious forces allineate, Carolina plans her next move.

programme.title: Red vs. Blue
programme.desc: Project Freelancer plans for a little payback, while the Reds and Blues hit the road again. The Freelancers brawl fire with fire. Project Freelancer sends in the big guns.

programme.title: Red vs. Blue
programme.desc: Tex and Carolina face off, while Sarge and Simmons meet old friends. In order to create his latest A.I. program, the Director experiments on the Alpha.

programme.title: Red vs. Blue
programme.desc: Epsilon tries to get some answers from Carolina, while Tex finds out some interesting information. Carolina and Epsilon bicker with the Reds and Blues over their plans to neutralize the Director. Project Freelancer is attacked by Agent Texas.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed Racer enters his first race to win money for his family. Meanwhile, a gang of robbers are after Pops's secret plans... which he hid in the windshield of Speed's car.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed Racer must win a dangerous mountain race against Ace Ducey to save his father's plans to improve the Mach 5.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The team tears down Mike Hill's '70 Superbird and finishes up final touches on Chris Driscoll's '70 AAR Cuda. Daren confronts Mark about stealing parts from his car and Mark gets a rematch on Chris Driscoll's race track.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Holly asks Mark if she can work on cars. Mark Cain from Bad Boy Blasters brings the crew a huge gift. The '70 Barracuda Convertible is torn down and sent to the dipper, progress is made on the '70 Sunroof Challenger and Mark gets a surprise from one of his favorite actors.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark installs the hood decal on the '70 Sunroof Challenger, Holly helps Josh disassemble the Barracuda suspension, Mark and Daren work on the 440 engine for the Challenger, and the team assembles one of the rarest Mopar options, the sunroof for the '70 Challenger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The team rushes to ready the '69 Dodge Daytona for Tom Partridge and his family's visit. The guys settle a leadership dispute the old fashioned way, the Graveyard Carz van gets a face lift, and Daren retaliates when Mark won't let him sign for deliveries.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Holly helps Mark on the '70 Challenger, Daren annoys everyone with his popcorn and causes Mark to damage a very rare car. Tony D'Agostino, from Tony's Mopar Parts, visits and lends a hand on the '70 sunroof Challenger. Mark lets Holly in on the big secret and Daren reveals a secret of his own.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark gets a portable showroom, the '70 Hemi Charger is dissembled and the team finishes the 1970 Sunroof Challenger. Mark finally reveals his big secret project to the Graveyard Carz team and Royal makes a video tribute to the Sunroof Challenger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark and the ghouls build out the 440 Super Commando engine for their '70 Plymouth Superbird and install the suspension for the '69 Daytona Charger. Daren finally has enough of Mark's foolishness.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Body man Derrick becomes an official Graveyard Carz crew member and assists in the disassembly of the rare '67 Plymouth Hemi GTX Convertible. Josh and Daren play "the game" with Mark.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghoulz get a massive sheet-metal order from AMD for their '70 Plymouth Superbird. Meanwhile, the owners of the '72 Charger visit and talk about what made their car so special. Daren gets the offer of a lifetime on his '70 Challenger R/T.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: It's a Moparween at Graveyard Carz! Just when things couldn't get crazier, Bill Goldberg shows up to go over his '68 GTX Convertible and knock some sense into the guys. He can handle the NFL and the WCW, but can he hold his own at GYC?

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Find out what goes into the electrical wiring on a new age Super Car….not as much as you might think.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Every muscle car should have the power to match its looks, so Bryan and Byrd add a monster overdrive transmission to a 1972 Chevelle.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan bring out their 1977 CB550 motorcycle project. Kevin handles the electronics and Bryan custom fabricates the exhaust.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan begin work on a custom 1930’s roadster. This is not your typical roadster renovation…it is a true custom build up that begins with fabricating the frame from scratch!

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan continue re-building our 67 Camaro by rebuilding the quadra-jet carburetor.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Bryan does some welding on a 66 Nova while Kevin takes a trip to the dyno to dial in the new EFI system for the small block engine.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Bryan tightens the bumper on a 1969 Chevy Van and Kevin lights a fire with the wrong gauge wire.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Bryan and Kevin put a stop to the shakes on a 2006 Nissan. Also find out what happened when a graffiti artist put his mark on our garage.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: The Chassis for the Rock Racer is almost done, so Matt and Bruno add a Speedwire System and install the torque converter.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno replace a small engine on a go kart and get some help from some kids on a special project.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Bruno and Matt need to create an ultimate truck for work and play. They get a visit from Clint at ATS Diesel and find out what’s available in the aftermarket for performance.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Work continues on the Dodge Work and Play Project Truck. Today, we help the ride with a wireless air bag system and add some much needed storage capability.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Learn why a truck’s steering geometry is such an important issue to address after installing a lift kit on your truck.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: What causes a misfire in your engine? Follow Bruno and Matt as they travel through a diagnostic journey to find an answer to the problem.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno take an enclosed car trailer and turn it into a toy hauler with all the amenities of home.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno diagnose a “no-start problem” on an ‘05 Chevy Silverado and get some help with the repair from NASCAR Crew Chief Alan Gustafson.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Bryan and Kevin marry an engine transmission and work on patch panels for the Nova project.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Ride along with Kevin Byrd as he takes a pilgrimage to Plymouth with some of his Factory Five friends.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: 1967 Camaro wiring issues get cleaned up.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: The Impala is back and ready to breath with a new Kinsler intake.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Bryan rips apart a brand new Buelle to give it the Fuller touch.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Sam Memmolo is back to match wits with Kevin about the new 6.7 diesel Cummins.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan install a new exhaust kit on a new Challenger and then start work on Bryan’s 33 getting it ready for a chop.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Bryan finally gets to fulfill his dream of chopping the top on his 33.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Whether they are on the road, or in the garage, Bruno and Matt find answers to technical questions everyday. Today, they will answer some of your viewer questions while working on a new truck.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: One million miles may sound like a lot – but NOT for a Cummins Diesel engine. Today, we’ll find out what makes these incredible engines built to last.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Bruno and Matt bring a 1972 Murdered Out Chevy pickup back from the dead by adding a new front clip and upgrading the brakes.

programme.title: Truck U
programme.desc: Today we find the limits to a stock four-wheel drive jeep. As we head out to the Eaton Proving Ground in Marshall, Michigan.

programme.title: Behind The Draw
programme.desc: Shawn finally connects with a big Montana Public Land Mule Deer after many incredible stalks throughout the week. This week was one for the books filled with many ups and downs! We can't thank our buddy Cody enough for inviting us out! Don't miss Part 2 of this epic Montana Bow hunt!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade and the crew head north to scout out, plan, and put in the plots to lay the groundwork for this falls hunting season in the Midwest!

programme.title: Shoshone Adventures
programme.desc: No roads. No shortcuts. This was a true backcountry elk hunt in the deep New Mexico wilderness—packed in on horseback, living out of camp, and chasing bugling bulls from daylight to dark. With bows in hand and rutting elk all around us, nearly every day brought close encounters, intense calling sequences, and heart-pounding moments at full draw.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.

programme.title: Huntstand Presents
programme.desc: After several years of shifting focus back to his native whitetails, Dahlke returns to mule deer country with the Muley Freak, Erik Van Woerkom. Follow along on this Utah mule deer hunt.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Youth turkey season in Alabama is always special, but this one means a little bit more. Isaac takes Dylan Hunt to the woods for Alabama’s Youth Opening Weekend with hopes of calling in Dylan a gobbler. Youth season is all about passing on the tradition, and there’s nothing better than watching the next generation experience the thrill of turkey hunting.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi has an opportunity to join a deer lease with good friends, Nick Ventura, Tom Petry and Jason Matzinger. They were adding a little golf but also have the unique opportunity to hunt the golf course.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi and Chris have hunted NM for years with some success each year. This year they included two new friends, Nick Ventura and his dad. Willi had some success mid-hunt and with the clock winding down on the last evening, would the far off bugle produce a bull for Chris?

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Willi gets his chance to check one off his bucket list on an Alaskan moose hunting adventure.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Colton and Tyler Jordan continue their hunt for the single season turkey grand slam in Texas as they both try to put their tag on a long spur Rio Grande Turkey.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: The Realtree Crew hunts the Texas Turkey opener and is able to tag a few tough working gobblers!

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: David Blanton and Mike Chamberlin have 2 incredible late season hunts in South Dakota. A flock comes into the hen decoy and a Jake trying to breed the decoy drives the Toms insane!

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Kevin and Keelan Harvick head to Realtree Farms in Georgia with Bill Jordan and Roger Culpepper for their annual turkey hunt. The father and son love to spend time together in the outdoors and this trip was definitely one for the books.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Roger Culpepper takes Sophia Mahlke and her dad Tom to kill her first longbeard. The guys and girl find the gobblers on roost in a beautiful Georgia hardwood bottom and make their move.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: David Blanton has had an amazing spring so far - almost too good to be true. You won't believe what happened on his latest turkey hunt in Georgia.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: We were honored to be a part of the Gold Star Youth Outdoors Turkey Hunt at Iron Horse Farms in Alabama. Cole Barthel and Bryan Brown were able to get Charlie Willington his first turkey. Be sure to check out Gold Star Youth Outdoors and Iron Horse Farms.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma trying to run some trot lines on the North Canadian river but the water is just a little lower than they expected.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: Randy is at the Raven in Missouri trying to take advantage of some dry weather and get some Big Tine borderline planted and check off a long list of other summer time prep work as opening day of deer season will be here before we know it.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: Back at the Raven for bow camp and everything is coming together. Randy has a close encounter with one of the OG bucks on the property while Nate closes the deal on a big five year old.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Crystal River, Fl, taking the Cayo out into the Gulf in search of Shallow Water Grouper.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run from Hawks Cay Resort up to Islamorada on a windy day to fish under the mangroves for Goliath grouper.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor join Captain Bryson Shaaber to fish the channels around Key West targeting big spring tarpon with live pinfish.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor launch out of Key Largo and fish their way up a creek filled with monsters.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Captain Tony Young for a day of offshore fishing and free diving out of Islamorada.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head deep into the Everglades to target snook in the murky waters of Lake Ingraham.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Young Captain Reed Tudor hosts Captain Mike in Duck Key, FL and puts him on Micro Tarpon, Redfish and Goliath Grouper.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: Despite the weather, Capt. Josh Calhoon and his wife Anna take a day off to target mangrove snapper before moving into deeper water to search for quality amberjacks.

programme.title: Fox Hollow Outdoors
programme.desc: Larken and Michael set out on a Florida Man adventure in part 1 of this 2 part series. Join them in the Florida keys and Everglades for an experience that few get to experience.

programme.title: Fox Hollow Outdoors
programme.desc: On this episode of Fox Hollow Outdoors, Michael and Larken end their trip to Florida with an epic day of offshore fishing with Captain Chris Trosset.

programme.title: Silver Kings
programme.desc: Capt. Jared Raskob joins his wife, “The Amazing Katie Raskob” on a big adventure for his 500th slam.

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode of Local Lines Brandon Branch fishes Ozello Florida.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Capt CA is with fellow Captains for Clean Water advocate Cody Rubner in Jensen Beach, FL power fishing for Snook.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Flamingo, Everglades National Park, in search of silver and gold.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: With Meredith McCord halfway around the world, Capt. Justin Leake gives show producer Chris Hermans his first shot at landing a tarpon after filming them for 9 seasons. Does art imitate life?

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Capt. Justin Leake joins some old friends on board the Fall Line in hopes of scoring big in the Bay Point Billfish Open. This trip will test the limits of all the anglers as the skilled captain and crew do the impossible in hopes of bringing home the prize.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they tag along side Dr. James Kroll for his annual deer day! This is a great opportunity to learn from one of the best. We are blessed to be able to share his knowledge with other like minded outdoor enthusiasts.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: In this in-depth episode of Deer & Deer Hunting TV, the team explores what it truly takes to implement an advanced food plot strategy. We go beyond the basics, walking viewers through soil science, crop rotation, plot placement, and how to integrate food plots into a larger habitat management plan.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The mission of Shoot United is to be a content resource for millions of shooters and a place where people can learn, build confidence and find ways to participate. Through films, educational videos and articles, SU has impacted countless shooters all over the world. In this episode, join Shoot United Ambassadors as they inspire and educate through a series of instructional videos and stories in pistol, self-defense, trap and skeet and sporting clays. - GUESTS: Thea Van Sync (Team Winchester) Callie Farill (Team Winchester) Becky Yackley (Team Winchester) Theo Ribbs (Team Winchester) Jessica Hook (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: With human populations scattered through the landscape, human-wildlife conflict is a common occurrence in Borneo. Dan Cabela travels to the area to participate in an ambitious elephant collaring project, hoping to better understand how people and elephants can live harmoniously.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor meet up with Captain Nick LaBadie at Big Pine Key for an action packed day on the flats chasing tarpon, bonefish and permit for the elusive grand slam.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run from Hawks Cay Resort up to Islamorada on a windy day to fish under the mangroves for Goliath grouper.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor join Captain Bryson Shaaber to fish the channels around Key West targeting big spring tarpon with live pinfish.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor launch out of Key Largo and fish their way up a creek filled with monsters.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Captain Tony Young for a day of offshore fishing and free diving out of Islamorada.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head deep into the Everglades to target snook in the murky waters of Lake Ingraham.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Capt. Blair heads out to the very first spot we ever filmed a BWO show, with the first guide ever on BWO Capt. John Beach. - This time they're catching sheepshead, hopefully nobody gets bit this time.

programme.title: We Caught That
programme.desc: Capt. Jason Dozier and Janot take a break from the guided trips, and take themselves on a hunting adventure.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Season 11 is here and we’re kicking things off where every Florida Keys adventure begins: Key Largo. In this premiere episode, Rush Maltz jumps aboard a skiff with local captain Jake Leon to explore the shallow, clear waters that make Key Largo one of the most iconic fisheries in the Florida Keys. From stealthy presentations to explosive eats, this is inshore fishing at its finest. With unmatched access to the Atlantic Ocean, Florida Bay, and Everglades National Park, Key Largo truly lives up to its reputation as the gateway to paradise. From snook and sea trout to elusive bonefish, this episode sets the tone for a season built around world-class fishing, local eats, and unforgettable destinations. Get ready for the first stop of your Florida Keys experience.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The next stop on our Florida Keys adventure brings Rush Maltz to the legendary waters of Islamorada — a destination known for its laid-back island vibe, world-class fishing, fine dining, and easy access to the reef. Joining locals Jimmy Hendrix and Jordi Hortensi, the game plan is simple: check in by boat, chase fish, eat well, and go dive. From kite fishing the reef to fresh seafood and great company, this episode is all about experiencing the true rhythm of a Florida Keys vacation.

programme.title: Making Waves in The Palm Beaches
programme.desc: Featuring the Chase ‘n Tailz Fishing Tournament, the North Palm Beach Rowing Club, the Palm Beach Sailing Club, holiday boat parade & the Palm Beach International Boat Show.

programme.title: Wild Palm Beaches
programme.desc: Featuring Mang Gear in Jupiter, PBC ERM snorkeling Peanut Island, Limestone Creek Urban Natural Area & the art of nature segment with Sheri Gansz.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Young Captain Reed Tudor hosts Captain Mike in Duck Key, FL and puts him on Micro Tarpon, Redfish and Goliath Grouper.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike travels to the "Forgotten Coast" to fish Keaton Beach for the first time with the legendary Captain Greg DeVault.

programme.title: Cooking Panda
programme.desc: Welcome to Cooking Panda, your culinary hub inspired by shows like "Say Cheese," "Cakes & Cupcakes," "Sugar Rush," and more. Explore cheesemaking, indulge in sweet treats, and make cooking fun. Join "Liv B" for vegan twists, enroll in Cooking Panda Academy, and savor homemade bread with Chef Ale Gambini. Discover the joys of food with us!

programme.title: Cooking Panda
programme.desc: If you’ve ever had fried ice cream at a restaurant and thought to yourself, “But how do they do it?!” We’re here to tell you. And inspire you to make fried ice cream of your own, because it is delicious.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 200
programme.desc: We dive into the raw power and timeless lines of the Baia Atlantica 84 before shifting gears to the stylish versatility of the Ranieri International 255 SL

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 199
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the sheer elegance of the new Swan 128 flagship and take a high-speed look at the versatile Ranieri Sauvage 24

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 204
programme.desc: Admire the sleek lines and performance-driven design of the Solaris 55, then celebrate four decades of nautical history with the special edition Ranieri Azzurra 40th

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 172
programme.desc: Discover the stunning Pershing GTX116, the iconic Donzi XLV at PIBS, the rugged Tidewater 3100 Carolina Bay, and the luxurious Nordhavn N 51 Awanui in this episode, showcasing performance, adventure, and unparalleled craftsmanship.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 179
programme.desc: Experience the elegance of the Riva 82 Diva and the innovative design of the MJM 4 in this episode, showcasing luxury and performance in modern yachting.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 181
programme.desc: This episode showcases two Italian icons: the exhilarating Pershing GTX70 Sport Yacht, a 35-knot performance cruiser with a stunning fold-out beach club, and the ultimate luxury sailing escape aboard a Sailuxe Spartivento crewed catamaran, featuring five-star service and gourmet cuisine.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 188
programme.desc: The segment showcased four key boats: the Prestige M7 luxury power catamaran, the long-range, efficient Grand Banks 62 motor yacht, the versatile Regal 43 SAV sport vessel with fold-down terraces, and the rugged offshore fishing center console Boston Whaler 280 Outrage.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 192
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to performance and versatility, highlighting the 50-knot Italian maxi-RIB Mar.co E44 with its luxury cabin. It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).

programme.desc: Caught on Bodycam shows officers making life-or-death decisions in just 40 seconds.

programme.title: Presidents and UFOs: The Surprising Story
programme.desc: A history of UFO's and Presidents, from George Washington to Donald Trump, with expert testimony, interviews, and reports of personal encounters involving U.S. Presidents and unexplained paranormal phenomena.

programme.title: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: Charismatic cult leader Jim Jones led the People's Temple to Guyana, where over 900 followers died in a mass suicide after a U.S. congressman was murdered during an investigation.

programme.title: Cost of War
programme.desc: WWII cost $4.1 trillion in 2011 dollars. Up to 70 million people are believed to have died. About two-thirds of them were non-combatants, making it the deadliest conflict ever.

programme.title: The Greatest Generals
programme.desc: Douglas MacArthur's life in the army, from cradle to grave. Douglas, a five-star general, was a leading figure of the 20th Century and World War II.

programme.title: Hitler's Gold
programme.desc: With help from large corporations inside and outside of Germany, the Nazis had conquered much of Europe - and even their victims would be turned into profit.

programme.title: Cost of War
programme.desc: WWII cost $4.1 trillion in 2011 dollars. Up to 70 million people are believed to have died. About two-thirds of them were non-combatants, making it the deadliest conflict ever.

programme.title: Missions That Changed the War: Germany's Last Ace
programme.desc: 5/12/44 -- U.S. fighter group - Zemke's "Wolf Pack" - uses new tactics, changing the course of the air war over Europe. This day brings a fateful encounter between Col. Hubert Zemke, double ace Robert Ranking, & Germany's fighter ace Gunther Rall.

programme.title: Missions That Changed the War: Germany's Last Ace

programme.desc: Omari Russell, a single father from Brooklyn, becomes a school safety officer after being disqualified from the NYPD, but his protective instincts are put to the test when a school shooting happens at his daughter Mya’s school.

programme.title: Killa Hill
programme.desc: Island Mentality explores the origins of the Park Hill neighborhood, which was Method Man, Hassan Johnson, Raekwon, and Cappadonna. Their fond memories are interrupted by the introduction of the crack epidemic.

programme.title: Killa Hill
programme.desc: Former gang leader Toussaint Randle and others give the details of the Stapleton vs. Park Hill feud, which was escalated with the crack era takeover by ruthless West Indian drug kingpin Dusty Fat. Dusty's takeover introduced events that changed Park Hill.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Your go-to source for the latest motoring news, banter-filled discussions, and in-depth reviews.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Your go-to source for the latest motoring news, banter-filled discussions, and in-depth reviews.

programme.title: A House Without a Father
programme.desc: A single mother struggles to raise her daughters without their father through tough times of sacrifice, absence, and heartbreak.

programme.title: QT
programme.desc: Danielle gets shocking news about the show, Mia's unexpected workplace visit takes Chelsea by surprise, and Terrance faces a solitary birthday celebration.

programme.title: Crescent Gang
programme.desc: Six kids on Crescent Street fight to save their home with the help of a new friend who understands their struggle.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Your go-to source for the latest motoring news, banter-filled discussions, and in-depth reviews.

programme.title: Of 2 Minds
programme.desc: When a desperate businessman kidnaps the man sabotaging his company, he draws his fiancée and ex-wife into a dark spiral of secrets and manipulation, forcing them all to confront how far they’re willing to go to protect the lives they've built.

programme.title: Tomame o Dejame
programme.desc: Adan salva a Lara del secuestro. JC y Francisco deciden hacer publico su relacion.

programme.title: Tomame o Dejame
programme.desc: Aurora sigue con la esperanza de conquistar Andres. Lara y Eva defiensen su relacion y Leonardo y Danny tambien.

programme.title: Escandalos - Batalla Embriones
programme.desc: Una famosa estrella de comedias televisivas, a punto de casarse con un famoso actor de cine, se debe enfrentar a su exmarido cuando este decide convertirse en padre soltero, usando embriones que ambos congelaron durante su matrimonio.

programme.title: Escandalos - Adios a Las Ninas
programme.desc: Un vecindario como cualquier otro entra en pánico al descubrir que uno de sus vecinos, un hombre aparentemente normal, ha retenido en su sótano durante diez años a tres jóvenes secuestradas siendo adolescentes, torturándolas y violándolas continuamente, sin que nadie se percatara del alcance de su locura.

programme.title: Escandalos - Que Entre la Verdad
programme.desc: Una presentadora de televisión ha construido su fama llevando al estudio los casos más escandalosos. Cuando se ve involucrada e delitos de corrupción administrativa y condenada a arresto domiciliario, elige como hogar su estudio de televisión. Y está dispuesta a todo para recuperar su fama y su prestigio.

programme.title: Escandalos - La Grabacion
programme.desc: Dos políticos en contienda primaria, se comprometen ante su partido a llevar una campaña limpia. Cuando uno de los dos presenta una grabación donde el otro parece planificar su asesinato, el partido entero se ve juzgado ante la nación

programme.title: Prueba de Fe
programme.desc: En Lima la ciencia y la religión trabajan de la mano para revelar al mundo el verdadero rostro de Santa Rosa de Lima. Mientras tanto en un pueblo apartado una médico rural será testigo de un hecho milagroso que cambiará su vida y la de una niña que fue maltratada y encerrada, al igual que la Santa de Amêrica.

programme.title: Prueba de Fe
programme.desc: Una famosa neurocirujana, que ha perdido la fe a causa de una tragedia personal, es encargada por el Vaticano de confirmar la veracidad del milagro que llevará al fallecido Papa a los altares.

programme.title: Prueba de Fe
programme.desc: A un Sacerdote de alto rango se le encomienda detener una manifestación pacífica, que supuestamente se disfraza de religiosa. Cuando acude al pueblo a investigar se encuentra en presencia de un verdadero milagro

programme.title: Prueba de Fe
programme.desc: Una joven sordomuda quiere ser religiosa. Su familia se opone radicalmente a la idea. Cuando su madre está al borde de la muerte a causa de un accidente automovilístico, la fe de la joven en la Madre Teresa de Calcuta cambia la percepción de la vida en todos ellos.

programme.title: Prueba de Fe
programme.desc: Dos investigadores modernos hacen un trabajo de grado sobre un antiguo milagro de San Martín de Porres. Indagar en las declaraciones de los personajes y conocer directamente a uno de ellos hará que su cruda opinión al respecto se tambalee.

programme.title: Una Deliciosa Navidad
programme.desc: Máximo y Luciana son amantes de la cocina. Pero hasta allí llegan sus coincidencias. Él es un prestigioso chef apasionado por la comida molecular, y ella es una cocinera intuitiva empeñada en rescatar los sabores de su tierra. Cuando el destino los junta, en plena Navidad, en el restaurante que Máximo hereda de su padre y que Luciana regenta, la combinación es explosiva. Pero también deliciosa.

programme.title: Novios Por Navidad
programme.desc: VALERIA siempre soñó con una boda navideña. Y cuando se hizo planificadora de eventos, eso se convirtió en su sello. Cuando decidió casarse con BERNARDO planificó su boda para Diciembre. Pero no contaba con que TERE, su mejor amiga, terminaría robándole el novio y la idea. Tere le pide a Valeria que organicé su boda para navidad. Valeria acepta y decide presentarse a la boda del brazo del novio perfecto. Pero para ello necesita conseguir un novio con urgencia. Y no se le ocurre mejor idea que pedirle a CAMILO, el dueño de la finca colonial que han alquilado para la boda, que se haga pasar por su novio. Valeria y Camilo son polos opuestos, pero la magia de la navidad hace lo suyo y la mentira termina convirtiéndose en un inesperado romance.

programme.title: Mi Amor en Navidad
programme.desc: LUCAS es un famoso cantante. Su tema navideño “Mi Amor en Navidad” ha sido un hit desde hace casi dos décadas. Pero ya no siente deseos de seguir interpretando esta canción. Un diciembre decide tomarse unas vacaciones para reflexionar sobre su carrera y sobre su futuro y regresa al pueblo donde creció. Allí se rencuentra con ELISA, su amor de juventud y conoce a JORGE, el hijo adolescente de ELISA, que sueña con llegar a ser músico. A través de ellos se conecta con sus raíces y sus recuerdos y consigue de nuevo esos motivos que una vez lo enamoraron de la música, de la navidad… ¡y de Elisa!

programme.title: Una Deliciosa Navidad
programme.desc: Máximo y Luciana son amantes de la cocina. Pero hasta allí llegan sus coincidencias. Él es un prestigioso chef apasionado por la comida molecular, y ella es una cocinera intuitiva empeñada en rescatar los sabores de su tierra. Cuando el destino los junta, en plena Navidad, en el restaurante que Máximo hereda de su padre y que Luciana regenta, la combinación es explosiva. Pero también deliciosa.

programme.title: El Sabor de la Navidad
programme.desc: Una pequeña empresa familiar de Rompope enfrenta una encrucijada cuando una transnacional decide cerrar sus puertas en plena temporada navideña. Gregorio, un ambicioso ejecutivo, es el encargado de supervisar el cierre de la empresa local. Pero, al llegar, es recibido con calidez y hospitalidad por los trabajadores de la empresa, especialmente por Erica, la directora de la planta, que cree que su intención es aumentar la producción. Poco a poco Gregorio se sumerge en la magia de la comunidad, comenzando a cuestionar sus propias lealtades y enamorándose del lugar y de Erica. Gregorio terminará enfrentando a su empresa para salvar a la embotelladora y a sus trabajadores y así ganarse el corazón de Erica.

programme.title: Una Deliciosa Navidad
programme.desc: Máximo y Luciana son amantes de la cocina. Pero hasta allí llegan sus coincidencias. Él es un prestigioso chef apasionado por la comida molecular, y ella es una cocinera intuitiva empeñada en rescatar los sabores de su tierra. Cuando el destino los junta, en plena Navidad, en el restaurante que Máximo hereda de su padre y que Luciana regenta, la combinación es explosiva. Pero también deliciosa.

programme.title: Juntos Esta Navidad
programme.desc: Tras una ruptura amorosa, ISABEL decide alquilar una pequeña casita navideña en un apartado pueblito, para pasar la temporada decembrina trabajando en su libro. Pero el viudo JUAN ANDRÉS y su hija LAURITA han tenido la misma idea. Por un error les alquilan la misma casa. La zona está llena por la temporada y se ven obligados a compartir el lugar, en principio por una noche. Pero una serie de circunstancias hacen que la situación se alargue. La magia navideña hace de las suyas y, poco a poco, entre ISABEL y JUAN ANDRÉS surge una atracción muy especial.

programme.title: Intercambio Navideno
programme.desc: MAYA y ANA MARÍA son gemelas. Pero fueron separadas al nacer y entregadas a diferentes familias. Fueron criadas de maneras opuestas. ANA MARÍA es ahora una exitosa empresaria divorciada, que solo piensa en su éxito y en el trabajo. MAYA una incansable filántropa, criada por una familia que se dedica a trabajar en pro de los más necesitados. Ya adultas se descubren una a la otra y deciden guardar el secreto, para no hacer daño a sus familias. Pero una navidad deciden hacer la travesura de intercambiar sus vidas por una noche. Sin sospechar que aquella decisión las cambiará para siempre.

programme.title: La Mejor Navidad
programme.desc: Desde su divorcio, la ambiciosa Gloria ha dedicado todo su tiempo y su atención a su trabajo en Miami. Incluso sus hijos han pasado a un segundo plano. Cuando las circunstancias la obligan a pasar una navidad en familia en el rancho de su exmarido Eduardo en un pequeño pueblo de Jalisco, descubre que la felicidad y el amor suelen esconderse en las cosas más simples.

programme.title: Un Papa Para Navidad
programme.desc: Rebeca es una estrella de las redes. Se ha dejado encandilar de tal manera por la fama y el reconocimiento que su familia ha pasado a segundo plano. Pero una navidad un desconocido se presenta en su puerta afirmando que es su padre. Y aquel encuentro ayudará a Rebeca a recuperar lo verdaderamente importante en la vida.

programme.title: Mi Amor en Navidad
programme.desc: LUCAS es un famoso cantante. Su tema navideño “Mi Amor en Navidad” ha sido un hit desde hace casi dos décadas. Pero ya no siente deseos de seguir interpretando esta canción. Un diciembre decide tomarse unas vacaciones para reflexionar sobre su carrera y sobre su futuro y regresa al pueblo donde creció. Allí se rencuentra con ELISA, su amor de juventud y conoce a JORGE, el hijo adolescente de ELISA, que sueña con llegar a ser músico. A través de ellos se conecta con sus raíces y sus recuerdos y consigue de nuevo esos motivos que una vez lo enamoraron de la música, de la navidad… ¡y de Elisa!

programme.title: Una Navidad Complicada
programme.desc: En medio de la temporada navideña, Leticia y Guillermo, divorciados desde hace años, enfrentan una situación inesperada cuando su hijo adolescente recurre a una trampa para reunirlos, falsificando un correo electrónico conde invita a Guillermo y su nueva novia a la casa familiar para Navidad. A medida que la forzada convivencia avanza, la relación entre Guillermo y su exesposa va cambiando. Guillermo descubre cuanto extraña su antigua vida, su vida familiar estable y hermosa. Y descubre que sigue amando a Leticia. Pero, para regresar definitivamente, necesita ganarse el perdón de Leticia y demostrarle que está dispuesto a cambiar. No es tan fácil, pero tal vez el espíritu navideño ayude a que suceda el milagro.

programme.title: Una Deliciosa Navidad
programme.desc: Máximo y Luciana son amantes de la cocina. Pero hasta allí llegan sus coincidencias. Él es un prestigioso chef apasionado por la comida molecular, y ella es una cocinera intuitiva empeñada en rescatar los sabores de su tierra. Cuando el destino los junta, en plena Navidad, en el restaurante que Máximo hereda de su padre y que Luciana regenta, la combinación es explosiva. Pero también deliciosa.

programme.title: Tomame o Dejame
programme.desc: Lara y Adan tiene su primera noche de amor, y Leonardo con un gran dolor por haber sido dejado, empieza a buscar consejos de como ser buen amante

programme.title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: College stud and a famed band player Ajay is introduced to the stunning daughter of a business tycoon named Ayesha. Ajay is smitten by Ayesha's modesty and coyness and what starts off as a mere acquaintance soon turns into full-blown love affair. But Ayesha's father Mr. Verma is unhappy with their union and his associate Mr. Chopra takes advantage of his discontentment. Mr. Chopra, wanting to take over Mr. Verma's fortune, suggests his own son for Ayesha and brainwashes him about Ajay. The situation takes a deadly turn when a hit-man is appointed to end Ajay's life. But seeing Ajay's aggressive stubbornness to be with Ayesha, Mr. Verma gives him a challenge, to find his lady-love within a day or leave from her life forever. Ajay accepts the challenge, unaware that a bigger conspiracy is at work to tear them apart once and for all.

programme.title: Aap Aye Bahaar Ayee
programme.desc: Childhood friends, Kumar and Rohit turn against each other when lovelorn Kumar molests Rohit's fiancée. After the ensuing fight between the two, the girl calls off the wedding only to realise that she’s pregnant with Kumar’s child.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Benaam
programme.desc: Amit, a married man, gets trouble upon saving a stabbed journalist. Thereafter, he starts receiving anonymous threats. Trouble starts mounting when Amit's son gets kidnapped and the only way to protect his family is to find this criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.
